32207.title: A Supply Curve for Forest-Based CO₂ Removal
32207.zh_title: 基于森林的二氧化碳清除供给曲线
32207.authors: Sergio L. Franklin Jr., Robert S. Pindyck
32207.abstract: Forestation is viewed as an important means of removing CO₂ from the atmosphere and thereby reducing net CO₂ emissions. But how much CO₂ can be removed, and at what cost? Focusing on forested and forestable areas in South America, and using spatially disaggregated data, we estimate a supply curve for forest-based atmospheric CO₂ removal. The supply curve traces out the marginal cost of removing a metric ton of CO₂ as a function of total annual CO₂ removal. Each point on the curve corresponds to a specific location, and accounts for land opportunity costs as well as costs of tree planting and maintenance. We show that over a billion tons of CO₂ can be removed annually via forestation at a cost below $\$45$ per ton, and about 2.5 billion tons can be removed at a cost below $\$90$ per ton. The supply curve applies to only South America, but with sufficient data could be extended to the entire world.
32207.zh_abstract: 植树造林被视为从大气中清除二氧化碳从而减少净二氧化碳排放的重要手段。但可以清除多少二氧化碳，成本又是多少？我们聚焦于南美洲的森林和可造林区域，利用空间分解数据，估计了一条基于森林的大气二氧化碳清除供给曲线。该供给曲线描绘了清除一公吨二氧化碳的边际成本，作为年总二氧化碳清除量的函数。曲线上的每一点对应一个特定地点，并考虑了土地机会成本以及植树和养护成本。我们表明，每年可以通过植树造林以低于每吨45美元的成本清除超过十亿吨二氧化碳，而以低于每吨90美元的成本可以清除约25亿吨。该供给曲线仅适用于南美洲，但如果有足够的数据，可以扩展到整个世界。

32206.title: New Area- and Population-based Geographic Crosswalks for U.S. Counties and Congressional Districts, 1790–2020
32206.zh_title: 基于新区域和人口的美国县及国会选区地理交叉对照表（1790–2020）
32206.authors: Andreas Ferrara, Patrick A. Testa, Liyang Zhou
32206.abstract: In applied historical research, geographic units often differ in level of aggregation across datasets. One solution is to use crosswalks that associate factors located within one geographic unit to another, based on their relative areas. We develop an alternative approach based on relative populations, which accounts for heterogeneities in urbanization within counties. We construct population-based crosswalks for 1790 through 2020, which map county-level data across U.S. censuses, as well as from counties to congressional districts. Using official census data for congressional districts, we show that population-based weights outperform area-based ones in terms of similarity to official data.
32206.zh_abstract: 在应用历史研究中，不同数据集的地理单元在聚合层级上往往存在差异。一种解决方案是使用交叉对照表，根据相对面积将位于一个地理单元内的要素关联到另一个单元。我们开发了一种基于相对人口的替代方法，该方法考虑了县内城市化的异质性。我们构建了1790年至2020年基于人口的交叉对照表，这些表格将美国人口普查中的县级数据相互映射，同时也将县级数据映射到国会选区。利用国会选区的官方人口普查数据，我们证明基于人口的权重在与官方数据的相似性方面优于基于面积的权重。

32205.title: Decarbonizing Aviation: Cash-for-Clunkers in the Airline Industry
32205.zh_title: 航空业脱碳：航空业的“旧车换现金”计划
32205.authors: Jan K. Brueckner, Matthew E. Kahn, Jerry Nickelsburg
32205.abstract: The durability of the transportation capital stock slows down the pace of decarbonization since newer vintages feature cutting-edge technology. If older vintages were to be retired sooner, the social cost of travel would decline. This paper analyzes and explores the viability of a potential cash-for-clunkers program for the airline industry, which would help to hasten decarbonization of US aviation. Our estimation and calculations show that airlines can be induced to scrap rather than sell older planes upon retirement with a payment that is less than the forgone carbon damage, yielding net social benefits.
32205.zh_abstract: 交通资本存量的耐久性减缓了脱碳进程，因为较新的资产具有尖端技术。如果较旧的资产能更早退役，出行的社会成本将会降低。本文分析并探讨了航空业潜在“旧车换现金”计划的可行性，该计划有助于加速美国航空业的脱碳。我们的估算和计算表明，可以通过支付低于所避免的碳损害金额的款项，促使航空公司在退役时报废而非出售旧飞机，从而产生净社会效益。

32204.title: The Multigenerational Impact of Children and Childcare Policies
32204.zh_title: 儿童与儿童保育政策的多代际影响
32204.authors: Sencer Karademir, Jean-William P. Laliberté, Stefan Staubli
32204.abstract: This paper examines the multigenerational impact of children and whether the public provision of formal childcare lessens the earnings and employment impacts of children. We find that the arrival of a firstborn reduces employment and earnings of mothers and employment of grandmothers. Studying a universal childcare program in Quebec, we find formal childcare increases the employment rates of mothers, as well as that of grandmothers to a lesser extent. Examining heterogeneity of the program's impact across Census Divisions, we find a negative correlation between the positive effects on mothers' employment and the pre-policy supply of informal childcare by grandmothers.
32204.zh_abstract: 本文考察了儿童的多代际影响，以及公共提供的正式儿童保育是否减轻了儿童对收入和就业的影响。我们发现，第一个孩子的出生降低了母亲的就业和收入，也降低了祖母的就业。通过研究魁北克的一项普及儿童保育计划，我们发现正式儿童保育提高了母亲的就业率，并在较小程度上提高了祖母的就业率。在考察该计划在各人口普查分区影响的异质性时，我们发现对母亲就业的积极影响与政策前祖母提供的非正式儿童保育供给之间存在负相关关系。
32204.meta: Programs：AG, CH, LS, PE；JEL：H31, J08, J13, J16, J18, J22

32203.title: Inequality Within Countries is Falling: Underreporting-Robust Estimates of World Poverty, Inequality and the Global Distribution of Income
32203.zh_title: 国家内部不平等正在下降：基于漏报稳健估计的世界贫困、不平等与全球收入分配
32203.authors: Maxim Pinkovskiy, Xavier Sala-i-Martin, Kasey Chatterji-Len, William H. Nober
32203.abstract: Household surveys suffer from persistent and growing underreporting. We propose a novel procedure to adjust reported survey incomes for underreporting by estimating a model of misreporting whose main parameter of interest is the elasticity of regional national accounts income to regional survey income, which is closely related to the elasticity of underreporting with respect to income. We find this elasticity to be substantial but roughly constant over time, implying a large but relatively constant correction to survey-derived inequality estimates. Underreporting of income by the bottom 50% of the world income distribution has become particularly important in recent decades. We reconfirm the findings of the literature that global poverty and inequality have declined dramatically between 1980 and 2019. Finally, we find that within-country inequality is falling on average, and has been largely constant since the 1990s.
32203.zh_abstract: 住户调查存在持续且日益严重的漏报问题。我们提出了一种新方法，通过估计一个误报模型来调整调查报告中因漏报而失真的收入，该模型的主要兴趣参数是区域国民账户收入对区域调查收入的弹性，这与收入漏报弹性密切相关。我们发现该弹性很大但随时间大致恒定，这意味着对基于调查得出的不平等估计需要进行大幅但相对恒定的修正。近几十年来，全球收入分配底层50%人群的收入漏报变得尤为重要。我们再次确认了文献中的发现，即1980年至2019年间全球贫困和不平等大幅下降。最后，我们发现国家内部不平等平均而言正在下降，并且自1990年代以来基本保持稳定。

32202.title: Globalization and Profitability of US Firms: The Role of Intangibles
32202.zh_title: 全球化与美国企业的盈利能力：无形资产的作用
32202.authors: Bullipe R. Chintha, Ravi Jagannathan, Sri S. Sridhar
32202.abstract: China's admission into the WTO in 2001 heralded a new era of globalization, increasing both import competition in domestic markets and foreign opportunities for US firms. In the aggregate, the average annual profitability of US public firms during the post globalization period (2003-2019) increased by 11.5% of the corresponding pre-globalization period (1984-2002) profitability. This increase in overall aggregate profitability was primarily driven by foreign profitability increasing by 47.4% for firms in the S&P 500 index, which are larger and have more intangible assets created by R&D and SG&A expenditures. In contrast, following globalization, the average aggregate domestic profitability of US firms remained flat, and firms employed more capital to generate sales. Firms with higher intangible assets benefited more from globalization.
32202.zh_abstract: 中国于2001年加入世贸组织预示着一个全球化新时代的到来，既加剧了美国企业在国内市场的进口竞争，也增加了其海外机遇。总体而言，美国上市公司在全球化后期（2003-2019年）的年均盈利能力比相应的全球化前期（1984-2002年）提高了11.5%。总体盈利能力的这一增长主要源于标普500指数成分股公司的海外盈利能力提高了47.4%，这些公司规模更大，拥有更多由研发和销售、一般及管理费用支出创造的无形资产。相比之下，全球化之后，美国企业的平均国内总体盈利能力保持平稳，且企业使用更多资本来产生销售额。拥有更多无形资产的企业从全球化中获益更多。
32202.meta: Programs：AP, CF, IFM；JEL：F20, F30, G0, G12, G30, L1, L25

32201.title: Is There Information in Corporate Acquisition Plans?
32201.zh_title: 企业收购计划中是否包含信息？
32201.authors: Sinan Gokkaya, Xi Liu, René M. Stulz
32201.abstract: For many firms, the acquisition process begins with the development of an acquisition plan that is communicated to investors. Using a novel dataset, we provide the first study of acquisition plans and offer new perspectives on the acquisition process. We find that acquisition plan announcements are informative and incrementally predict subsequent acquisition activity. These results are more pronounced for firms announcing commitment to acquisitions from an internal pipeline. Acquisition plans improve acquisition performance due to learning from market feedback and reduce acquisition-related uncertainty. Communication of acquisition plans does not increase takeover premiums but is less common in more competitive industries.
32201.zh_abstract: 对许多公司而言，收购过程始于制定收购计划并将其传达给投资者。利用一个新颖的数据集，我们首次对收购计划进行了研究，并为收购过程提供了新的视角。我们发现，收购计划公告具有信息含量，并能增量预测后续的收购活动。对于宣布从内部渠道承诺进行收购的公司，这些结果更为显著。收购计划通过从市场反馈中学习来提高收购绩效，并减少与收购相关的不确定性。收购计划的沟通不会提高收购溢价，但在竞争更激烈的行业中不太常见。

32200.title: Welfare and the Act of Choosing
32200.authors: B. Douglas Bernheim, Kristy Kim, Dmitry Taubinsky
32200.abstract: The standard revealed-preference approach to welfare economics encounters fundamental difficulties when the act of choosing directly affects welfare through emotions such as guilt, pride, and anxiety. We address this problem through an approach that redefines consumption bundles in terms of the sensations they produce, and measures welfare by blending methods involving choice and subjective well-being. In a laboratory experiment on redistributive preferences, and in surveys concerning consequential economic decisions, we find that revealed-preference methods, including those that exploit choices over menus, mismeasure welfare because preferences depend on choice sets, while happiness and satisfaction are not sufficient statistics for welfare.
32200.zh_abstract: 当选择行为本身通过内疚、自豪和焦虑等情绪直接影响福利时，标准的经济福利学显示性偏好方法会遇到根本性困难。我们通过一种方法来解决这个问题，该方法根据消费束所产生的感受来重新定义消费束，并通过结合涉及选择和主观幸福感的方法来衡量福利。在一个关于再分配偏好的实验室实验中，以及在涉及重大经济决策的调查中，我们发现显示性偏好方法（包括那些利用菜单选择的方法）会错误衡量福利，因为偏好取决于选择集，而幸福感和满意度并非福利的充分统计量。

32235.title: On the Feasibility, Costs, and Benefits of an Immediate Phasedown of Coal for U.S. Electricity Generation
32235.zh_title: 关于美国发电用煤立即逐步淘汰的可行性、成本与收益
32235.authors: Stephen P. Holland, Matthew Kotchen, Erin T. Mansur, Andrew J. Yates
32235.abstract: The phasedown of coal for electricity generation is considered vital to meeting global climate targets. Many countries have pledged to stop using coal, with some as early as 2030. While the United States has no target currently in place, several states do. In this paper, we examine the feasibility of phasing down U.S. coal-generated electricity given the existing fleet of power plants. In particular, we take consumption as given and evaluate how prioritizing natural gas generation over that of coal would change emissions and operating costs. To do this, we develop a replacement algorithm based on transmission regions and marginal cost comparisons. Using our preferred scenarios, we find that between 66 and 94 percent of coal generation could be replaced immediately, reducing electricity sector carbon dioxide (CO₂) emissions between 18 and 29 percent – equivalent to between 5 and 8 percent of total U.S. energy related emissions. The cost range is between $\$49$ and $\$92$ per ton of CO₂, where benefit-cost ratios are favorable in some scenarios considering local pollutant co-benefits alone. Despite the command-and-control nature of prioritizing natural gas generation, we find it relatively cost effective even in comparison to a Pigouvian tax. We examine sensitivity of the results to transmission regions, replacement cost conditions, natural gas pipeline capacity, and alternative fuel prices.
32235.zh_abstract: 逐步淘汰用于发电的煤炭被认为对实现全球气候目标至关重要。许多国家已承诺停止使用煤炭，有些国家甚至计划在2030年之前实现。虽然美国目前没有设定目标，但一些州已经制定了目标。在本文中，我们基于现有发电厂存量，考察了逐步淘汰美国燃煤发电的可行性。具体而言，我们将消费视为给定，并评估优先使用天然气发电而非煤炭发电将如何改变排放和运营成本。为此，我们基于输电区域和边际成本比较开发了一个替代算法。使用我们偏好的情景，我们发现66%至94%的燃煤发电可以立即被替代，从而使电力部门的二氧化碳排放量减少18%至29%——相当于美国总能源相关排放量的5%至8%。成本范围为每吨二氧化碳49至92美元，在仅考虑本地污染物协同效益的某些情景下，效益成本比是有利的。尽管优先使用天然气发电具有命令与控制的性质，但我们发现即使与庇古税相比，它也是相对成本有效的。我们考察了结果对输电区域、替代成本条件、天然气管道容量和替代燃料价格的敏感性。

32234.title: On Recoding Ordered Treatments as Binary Indicators
32234.zh_title: 关于将有序处理变量重新编码为二元指标
32234.abstract: Researchers using instrumental variables to investigate ordered treatments often recode treatment into an indicator for any exposure. We investigate this estimand under the assumption that the instruments shift compliers from no treatment to some but not from some treatment to more. We show that when there are extensive margin compliers only (EMCO) this estimand captures a weighted average of treatment effects that can be partially unbundled into each complier group's potential outcome means. We also establish an equivalence between EMCO and a two-factor selection model and apply our results to study treatment heterogeneity in the Oregon Health Insurance Experiment.
32234.zh_abstract: 使用工具变量研究有序处理变量的研究者，常常将处理变量重新编码为是否接受任何处理的指标。我们在假设工具变量将依从者从无处理推向某种处理、但不会从某种处理推向更多处理的条件下，研究这一估计量。我们证明，当仅存在广延边际依从者（EMCO）时，该估计量捕捉的是处理效应的加权平均值，该平均值可以部分分解为每个依从者组的潜在结果均值。我们还建立了EMCO与一个双因素选择模型之间的等价性，并将我们的结果应用于研究俄勒冈健康保险实验中的处理异质性。

32233.title: Driving Under the Influence of Allergies: The Effect of Seasonal Pollen on Traffic Fatalities
32233.zh_title: 过敏影响下的驾驶：季节性花粉对交通死亡事故的影响
32233.abstract: Traffic fatalities are the leading cause of mortality in the United States despite being preventable. While several policies have been introduced to improve traffic safety and their effects have been well documented, the role of transitory health shocks or situational factors at explaining variations in fatal traffic accidents has been understudied. Exploring daily variation in city-specific pollen counts, this study finds novel evidence that traffic fatalities increase on days in which the local pollen count is particularly high. We find that the effects are present in accidents involving private vehicles and occur most frequently on the weekends, suggesting potentially the missed opportunity to avoid these fatalities. We do not find similar effects for fleet vehicles. These findings remain robust to alternative specifications and alternative definitions of high pollen count. Taken together, this study finds evidence that a prevalent and transitory exogenous health-shock, namely pollen allergies, increases traffic fatalities. Given our lack of evidence of avoidance, these effects are not mechanical and are likely driven by cognitive impairments that arise as a result of seasonal allergies.
32233.zh_abstract: 尽管可以预防，交通死亡事故仍是美国的主要死因。虽然已经出台了几项改善交通安全的政策，并且其效果已有充分记录，但暂时性健康冲击或情境因素在解释致命交通事故变化方面的作用尚未得到充分研究。通过探索城市特定花粉计数的日度变化，本研究发现新的证据表明，在当地花粉计数特别高的日子里，交通死亡事故会增加。我们发现，这种影响存在于涉及私家车的事故中，并且最常发生在周末，这表明可能存在避免这些死亡事故的错失机会。我们没有发现对车队车辆有类似的影响。这些发现在替代规格和替代的高花粉计数定义下仍然稳健。综上所述，本研究发现证据表明，一种普遍且短暂的 exogenous 健康冲击——即花粉过敏——会增加交通死亡事故。鉴于我们缺乏规避行为的证据，这些影响并非机械性的，很可能由季节性过敏引起的认知障碍所驱动。

32232.title: Air Pollution, Wildfire Smoke, and Worker Health
32232.zh_title: 空气污染、野火烟雾与工人健康
32232.abstract: Despite growing concerns about the impact of pollution on workers, little is known about how pollution impacts worker health and workplace safety. This paper leverages high-frequency, plausibly exogenous variation in wildfire smoke to estimate the impact of pollution on workplace injuries. Our analysis draws on unique data we construct through linking information on smoke plumes and pollution to comprehensive administrative data on workers’ compensation injury claims from Texas. We first document that wildfire smoke increases ambient air pollution—with our estimates indicating that a day of smoke coverage is associated with an average increase in PM2.5 of 18.6%.We find that an additional day of smoke coverage leads to a 2.8% increase in workplace injury claims. Similar percent increases in workplace injuries are found across different types of injuries and workers. However, because of large variation in baseline injury risk, the incidence of these pollution-induced injuries is concentrated among workers in high-risk occupations, and supplemental analysis illustrates potential opportunities for improving the targeting of costly mitigation. Our estimates indicate that pollution—and wildfire smoke in particular—substantially harms worker health, even at pollution levels well below current and proposed regulatory standards. Moreover, the implied costs associated with increased workplace injuries are in the same range as prior estimates of the costs of pollution from reduced worker productivity or increased health care utilization among children or the elderly. Overall, our findings suggest workers face unique risks from pollution and provide insights for policy aiming to address these risks.
32232.zh_abstract: 尽管人们越来越关注污染对工人的影响，但关于污染如何影响工人健康和工作场所安全，我们知之甚少。本文利用高频、看似外生的野火烟雾变化来估计污染对工伤的影响。我们的分析基于独特的数据集，该数据集通过将烟雾羽流和污染信息与来自德克萨斯州的工人赔偿工伤索赔的全面行政数据相关联而构建。我们首先证明，野火烟雾增加了环境空气污染——我们的估计表明，一天的烟雾覆盖与PM2.5平均增加18.6%相关。我们发现，额外一天的烟雾覆盖导致工伤索赔增加2.8%。在不同类型的伤害和工人中，工伤的百分比增长相似。然而，由于基线工伤风险存在巨大差异，这些污染引发的伤害主要集中在高风险职业的工人中，补充分析说明了改善昂贵缓解措施针对性的潜在机会。我们的估计表明，污染——尤其是野火烟雾——会严重损害工人健康，即使在远低于当前和拟议监管标准的污染水平下也是如此。此外，与工伤增加相关的隐含成本，与先前关于污染导致工人生产率下降或儿童或老年人医疗保健利用增加的成本估计范围相同。总体而言，我们的研究结果表明，工人面临独特的污染风险，并为旨在应对这些风险的政策提供了见解。
32232.meta: Programs：EEE, EH, LS, PE；JEL：I18, J28, J3, Q53

32231.title: A Practical Guide to Endogeneity Correction Using Copulas
32231.zh_title: 使用Copula进行内生性校正的实用指南
32231.authors: Yi Qian, Anthony Koschmann, Hui Xie
32231.abstract: Causal inference is of central interest in many empirical applications, yet often challenging because of the presence of endogenous regressors. The classical approach to the problem requires using instrumental variables that must satisfy the stringent condition of exclusion restriction. In recent research, instrument-free copula methods have been increasingly used to handle endogenous regressors. This article aims to provide a practical guide for how to handle endogeneity using copulas. The authors give an overview of copula endogeneity correction, outlining its theoretical rationales, advantages, and limitations for empirical research. They also discuss recent advances that enhance the understanding, applicability, and robustness of copula correction, and address implementation aspects of copula correction such as constructing copula control functions and handling higher-order terms of endogenous regressors. To facilitate the appropriate usage of copula correction in order to realize its full potential, the authors detail a process of checking data requirements and identification assumptions to determine when and how to use copula correction methods, and illustrate its usage using empirical examples.
32231.zh_abstract: 因果推断是许多实证应用的核心关注点，但由于存在内生回归量，这通常具有挑战性。解决该问题的经典方法需要使用工具变量，而工具变量必须满足排他性约束这一严格条件。在近期的研究中，无工具变量的copula方法已被越来越多地用于处理内生回归量。本文旨在为如何使用copula处理内生性提供一份实用指南。作者概述了copula内生性校正方法，阐述了其理论依据、优势以及在实证研究中的局限性。他们还讨论了近期在增强copula校正的理解、适用性和稳健性方面的进展，并探讨了copula校正的实施方面，例如构建copula控制函数和处理内生回归量的高阶项。为了促进copula校正的恰当使用以充分发挥其潜力，作者详细说明了检查数据要求和识别假设的过程，以确定何时以及如何使用copula校正方法，并通过实证示例说明了其用法。

32230.title: Sectoral Development Multipliers
32230.abstract: How should industrial policies be directed to reduce distortions and foster economic development? We study this question in a multi-sector model with technology adoption, where the production of goods and modern technologies features rich network structures. We provide simple formulas for the sectoral policy multipliers, and provide insights regarding the power of alternative policy instruments. We devise a simple procedure to estimate the model parameters and the distribution of technologies across sectors, which we apply to Indian data. We find that technology adoption greatly amplifies the multipliers' magnitudes, and it changes the ranking of priority sectors for industrial policy. Further, we find that adoption subsidies are the most cost-effective instrument for promoting economic development.
32230.zh_abstract: 产业政策应如何引导以减少扭曲并促进经济发展？我们在一个包含技术采用的多部门模型中研究这一问题，其中商品和现代技术的生产具有丰富的网络结构。我们提供了部门政策乘数的简单公式，并深入分析了不同政策工具的有效性。我们设计了一个简单的程序来估计模型参数以及技术在各部门的分布，并将其应用于印度数据。我们发现，技术采用极大地放大了乘数的规模，并改变了产业政策优先部门的排序。此外，我们发现采用补贴是促进经济发展最具成本效益的工具。
32230.meta: Programs：DEV, EFG, PR；JEL：O11, O14, O25, O41

32229.title: Toward an Understanding of the Returns to Cognitive Skill Across Cohorts
32229.zh_title: 理解认知技能回报的代际变化
32229.authors: Judith K. Hellerstein, Sai Luo, Sergio S. Urzúa
32229.abstract: Recent research concludes that wage returns to cognitive skills have declined in the U.S. We reassess this finding. Using decomposition methods, we document the pivotal role played by dynamic shifts in the distributions of pre-labor market cognitive skills. Our findings show these shifts explain the declining estimated returns to cognitive skills, especially for white men. We discard measurement error as a potential driver. Although often overlooked, grappling with changing pre-labor market skill distributions is necessary for capturing the evolution of labor market returns to cognitive skills. This may prove especially important in the future given continuing changes in skill development in recent youth cohorts.
32229.zh_abstract: 近期研究认为，美国认知技能的工资回报率已经下降。我们重新审视了这一发现。通过使用分解方法，我们记录了进入劳动力市场前的认知技能分布动态变化所起的关键作用。我们的研究结果表明，这些变化解释了认知技能估计回报率的下降，尤其是对白人男性而言。我们排除了测量误差作为潜在驱动因素的可能性。尽管常常被忽视，但应对进入劳动力市场前技能分布的变化，对于捕捉劳动力市场中认知技能回报的演变是必要的。鉴于近年来青年群体技能发展的持续变化，这一点在未来可能尤其重要。

32228.title: The Market and Climate Implications of U.S. LNG Exports
32228.zh_title: 美国液化天然气出口的市场与气候影响
32228.abstract: From 2015 to 2023, the United States transformed from a net importer of natural gas to the world's largest liquified natural gas (LNG) exporter. We find that this surge in LNG exports has reconnected U.S. gas prices to world market prices, after a hiatus of “shut-in” fracked gas. We estimate that the domestic gas price effect of this recoupling is comparable to a $\$30$/ton carbon tax. For coal prices, which are coupled to gas through competition in the power sector, this effect is comparable to a $\$20$/ton carbon tax. Using the NREL ReEDS model, we estimate that this recoupling reduces U.S. 2030 power sector CO2 emissions by roughly 145 million metric tons. These domestic estimates contribute to estimating the overall climate impact of LNG exports.
32228.zh_abstract: 从2015年到2023年，美国从天然气净进口国转变为全球最大的液化天然气出口国。我们发现，液化天然气出口的激增重新将美国天然气价格与世界市场价格联系起来，此前经历了“封存”压裂天然气的间歇期。我们估计，这种重新耦合对国内天然气价格的影响相当于每吨30美元的碳税。对于煤炭价格而言，由于电力部门中煤炭与天然气通过竞争相互关联，这种影响相当于每吨20美元的碳税。利用NREL ReEDS模型，我们估计这种重新耦合将使美国2030年电力部门的二氧化碳排放量减少约1.45亿公吨。这些国内估算有助于评估液化天然气出口的整体气候影响。

32227.title: Losing Medicaid and Crime
32227.authors: Monica Deza, Thanh Lu, Johanna Catherine Maclean, Alberto Ortega
32227.abstract: We study the impact of losing health insurance on crime by leveraging one of the most substantial Medicaid disenrollments in U.S. history, which occurred in Tennessee in 2005 and led to 170,000 adults unexpectedly losing coverage. Using police agency-level data and a difference-in-differences approach, we find that this mass insurance loss reduced Medicaid enrollment and increased total crime rates with particularly strong effects for non-violent crime. An analysis of mechanisms suggests that the disenrollment had aggregate effects that extended beyond insurance losses. In particular, we show that the policy shock lead to changes in economic stability, healthcare access and health outcomes, and government spending, all of which could have contributed to the increase in crime we document.
32227.zh_abstract: 我们利用美国历史上最大规模的医疗补助取消事件之一来研究失去健康保险对犯罪的影响，该事件于2005年在田纳西州发生，导致17万成年人意外失去保险。通过使用警察机构层面的数据和双重差分方法，我们发现，这种大规模的保险损失减少了医疗补助的参保率，并提高了总体犯罪率，对非暴力犯罪的影响尤为显著。对机制的分析表明，取消保险产生了超出保险损失本身的总体效应。具体而言，我们显示，这一政策冲击导致了经济稳定性、医疗保健可及性、健康结果以及政府支出的变化，所有这些都可能促成了我们所记录的犯罪增加。

32226.title: Fallow Lengths and the Structure of Property Rights
32226.authors: Etienne Le Rossignol, Sara Lowes, Eduardo Montero
32226.abstract: We study a fundamental institution in many societies: the structure of property rights over land. Across societies, communal land rights have been more common than private land rights. We test the hypothesis that longer fallow requirements – the time needed to leave land uncultivated to restore fertility based on ecological features of the soil and climate – led to a higher prevalence of communal property rights. Longer fallow requirements generate higher protection costs and therefore make communal rights more beneficial. We construct an ecological measure of the optimal fallow length for the most suitable staple crop across grid cells globally based on soil type, temperature, and climate. We find that places where land needs to be fallowed for longer periods are more likely to have communal property rights both historically and presently. We then examine the implications for efforts to title land. Using World Bank project ratings and academic impact evaluations, we find that land interventions are less effective and positive estimated impacts are systematically less common in settings with longer fallow requirements, suggesting a mismatch between development policy and the underlying context. Our results provide insights into the origins of property rights structures and the importance of aligning development policies with the cultural and institutional setting.
32226.zh_abstract: 我们研究了许多社会中的一项基本制度：土地产权结构。在不同社会中，共有土地权利比私有土地权利更为普遍。我们检验了以下假设：更长的休耕要求——即根据土壤和气候的生态特征，土地需要闲置以恢复肥力的时间——导致了共有产权制度的更高普及率。更长的休耕要求会产生更高的保护成本，从而使共有权利更加有利。我们基于土壤类型、温度和气候，构建了一个全球网格单元上最适合主粮作物的最优休耕长度的生态指标。我们发现，历史上和当前，土地需要休耕更长时间的地区更可能拥有共有产权制度。然后，我们考察了这对土地确权努力的影响。利用世界银行项目评级和学术影响评估，我们发现，在休耕要求更长的环境中，土地干预措施效果较差，且正面估计影响系统性较少，这表明发展政策与基本背景之间存在错配。我们的结果为产权制度的起源以及使发展政策与文化制度环境保持一致的重要性提供了见解。

32225.title: Corporate Debt, Boom-Bust Cycles, and Financial Crises
32225.zh_title: 企业债务、繁荣-萧条周期与金融危机
32225.authors: Victoria Ivashina, Ṣebnem Kalemli-Özcan, Luc Laeven, Karsten Müller
32225.abstract: Using a new dataset on sectoral credit exposures in 114 economies from 1940 to 2014, we provide evidence that corporate debt plays a key role in explaining macroeconomic boom-bust cycles, financial crises, and sluggish recoveries. We find that: (i) corporate debt accounts for two-thirds of aggregate credit expansion and three-quarters of nonperforming loans during downturns; (ii) firm credit growth is linked to future crises more so when it is backed by pro-cyclical collateral; (iii) expansions in corporate debt predict crises, conditional on expansions in household credit; (iv) increasing dispersion in corporate credit also predicts financial crises, consistent with heterogeneous firm financial frictions; (v) financial crises following booms in corporate debt are associated with slower macro recoveries.
32225.zh_abstract: 利用1940年至2014年114个经济体部门信贷敞口的新数据集，我们提供了证据表明企业债务在解释宏观经济繁荣-萧条周期、金融危机和缓慢复苏中起着关键作用。我们发现：（i）企业债务占总体信贷扩张的三分之二，占经济下行期间不良贷款的四分之三；（ii）企业信贷增长与未来危机的关联更强，尤其是当它以顺周期抵押品为支撑时；（iii）企业债务的扩张在家庭信贷扩张的条件下能预测危机；（iv）企业信贷分散度的增加也能预测金融危机，这与异质性企业的金融摩擦一致；（v）企业债务繁荣之后的金融危机与更缓慢的宏观复苏相关。

32224.title: Health Shocks under Hospital Capacity Constraint: Evidence from Air Pollution in Sao Paulo, Brazil
32224.zh_title: 医院容量约束下的健康冲击：来自巴西圣保罗空气污染的证据
32224.authors: Bruna Guidetti, Paula Pereda, Edson R. Severnini
32224.abstract: How responsive to health shocks are healthcare systems in the developing world? Developing countries are known to have both lower levels of hospital infrastructure and serious health shocks driven by air pollution. These shocks are transitory and may be marginal relative to other health demands, so healthcare systems might be able to manage them. On the other hand, with limited capacity hospitals may not be able to respond rapidly, possibly exacerbating health damages from pollution. In this study, we examine the consequences of health shocks induced by air pollution in a megacity in the developing world: Sao Paulo, Brazil. Using daily data on pediatric hospitalizations from 2015-2017, an instrumental variable approach based on wind speed, and a plausibly exogenous measure of hospital capacity constraints, we show that such transitory health shocks can disrupt healthcare services due to limited capacity, including for conditions seemingly unrelated to air pollution. Also, we cannot rule out severe deterioration of health outcomes.
32224.zh_abstract: 发展中国家的医疗系统对健康冲击的反应程度如何？众所周知，发展中国家既面临较低的医院基础设施水平，又面临由空气污染引发的严重健康冲击。这些冲击是暂时的，且相对于其他健康需求可能微不足道，因此医疗系统或许能够应对。另一方面，由于容量有限，医院可能无法迅速响应，这可能会加剧污染对健康的损害。在本研究中，我们考察了发展中国家特大城市——巴西圣保罗——由空气污染引发的健康冲击的后果。利用2015-2017年儿科住院的每日数据、基于风速的工具变量方法以及一个看似外生的医院容量约束指标，我们表明，这种暂时性的健康冲击会因容量有限而扰乱医疗服务，包括那些看似与空气污染无关的疾病。此外，我们不能排除健康状况严重恶化的可能性。
32224.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, EEE, EH；JEL：I15, O13, Q53, Q56

32223.title: The Causal Effect of Parents’ Education on Children’s Earnings
32223.zh_title: 父母教育对子女收入的因果效应
32223.authors: Sang Yoon (Tim) Lee, Nicolas A. Roys, Ananth Seshadri
32223.abstract: We present a model of endogenous schooling and earnings to isolate the causal effect of parents’ education on children’s education and earnings outcomes. The model suggests that parents’ education is positively related to children’s earnings, but its relationship with children’s education is ambiguous. Identification is achieved by comparing the earnings of children with the same length of schooling, whose parents have different lengths of schooling. The model also features heterogeneous preferences for schooling, and is estimated using HRS data. The empirically observed positive OLS coefficient obtained by regressing children’s schooling on parents’ schooling is mainly accounted for by the correlation between parents’ schooling and children’s unobserved preferences for schooling. This is countered by a negative, structural relationship between parents’ and children’s schooling choices, resulting in an IV coefficient close to zero when exogenously increasing parents’ schooling. Nonetheless, an exogenous one-year increase in parents’ schooling increases children’s lifetime earnings by 1.2 percent on average.
32223.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一个内生性教育与收入模型，以分离父母教育对子女教育和收入结果的因果效应。该模型表明，父母教育与子女收入正相关，但其与子女教育的关系则不确定。识别是通过比较受教育年限相同但父母受教育年限不同的子女的收入来实现的。该模型还包含对教育的异质性偏好，并使用HRS数据进行估计。通过将子女受教育年限对父母受教育年限进行回归得到的经验上正的OLS系数，主要归因于父母受教育年限与子女未观测到的教育偏好之间的相关性。这被父母与子女教育选择之间的负向结构性关系所抵消，导致当外生增加父母受教育年限时，IV系数接近于零。尽管如此，父母受教育年限外生增加一年，会使子女的终生收入平均增加1.2%。

32222.title: Non-Binary Gender Economics
32222.authors: Katherine B. Coffman, Lucas C. Coffman, Keith Marzilli Ericson
32222.abstract: Economics research has largely overlooked non-binary individuals. We aim to jump-start the literature by providing data on several economically-important beliefs and preferences. Among many results, non-binary individuals report more gender-based discrimination and express different career and life aspirations, including less desire for children. Anti-non-binary sentiment is stronger than anti-LGBT sentiment, and strongest among men. Non-binary respondents report lower assertiveness than men and women, and their social preferences are similar to men’s and less prosocial than women’s, with age an important moderator. Elicited beliefs reveal inaccurate stereotypes as people often mistake the direction of group differences or exaggerate their size.
32222.zh_abstract: 经济学研究在很大程度上忽视了非二元性别个体。我们旨在通过提供若干经济上重要的信念和偏好数据来启动这一领域的研究。在众多结果中，非二元性别个体报告了更多的基于性别的歧视，并表达了不同的职业和生活抱负，包括较少的生育意愿。反非二元性别情绪强于反LGBT情绪，且在男性中最为强烈。非二元性别受访者报告的自信程度低于男性和女性，其社会偏好与男性相似，但比女性更少亲社会性，其中年龄是一个重要的调节因素。通过诱导出的信念揭示了不准确的刻板印象，因为人们常常误解群体差异的方向或夸大其规模。

32221.title: Are Supply Networks Efficiently Resilient?
32221.zh_title: 供应链是否具有高效韧性？
32221.authors: Agostino Capponi, Chuan Du, Joseph E. Stiglitz
32221.abstract: We show that supply networks are inefficiently, and insufficiently, resilient. Upstream firms can adjust capacity investments to hedge against supply and demand shocks. However, the social benefits of such investments are not internalized, because of market incompleteness and market power. Upstream firms underinvest in resilience, passing on the costs to downstream firms, and drive trade excessively toward the spot markets. Policies designed to incentivize capacity investment, reduce reliance on spot markets, and enhance competition ameliorate the externality.
32221.zh_abstract: 我们表明供应链的韧性既低效又不足。上游企业可以调整产能投资以对冲供给和需求冲击。然而，由于市场不完全性和市场势力，这类投资的社会效益并未被内部化。上游企业对韧性投资不足，将成本转嫁给下游企业，并过度推动贸易转向现货市场。旨在激励产能投资、减少对现货市场依赖以及增强竞争的政策可以改善这种外部性。
32221.meta: Programs：IO；JEL：D21, D24, D25, D43, D85, E23, L13

32220.title: Movies
32220.abstract: Why are certain movies more successful in some markets than others? Are the entertainment products we consume reflective of our core values and beliefs? These questions drive our investigation into the relationship between a society’s oral tradition and the financial success of films. We combine a unique catalog of local tales, myths, and legends around the world with data on international movie screenings and revenues. First, we quantify the similarity between movies’ plots and traditional motifs employing machine learning techniques. Comparing the same movie across different markets, we establish that films that resonate more with local folklore systematically accrue higher revenue and are more likely to be screened. Second, we document analogous patterns within the US. Google Trends data reveal a pronounced interest in markets where ancestral narratives align more closely with a movie’s theme. Third, we delve into the explicit values transmitted by films, concentrating on the depiction of risk and gender roles. Films that promote risk-taking sell more in entrepreneurial societies today, rooted in traditions where characters pursue dangerous tasks successfully. Films portraying women in stereotypical roles continue to find a robust audience in societies with similar gender stereotypes in their folklore and where women today continue being relegated to subordinate positions. These findings underscore the enduring influence of traditional storytelling on entertainment patterns in the 21st century, highlighting a profound connection between movie consumption and deeply ingrained cultural narratives and values.
32220.zh_abstract: 为什么某些电影在某些市场比其他市场更成功？我们消费的娱乐产品是否反映了我们的核心价值观和信仰？这些问题驱动我们研究社会口头传统与电影财务成功之间的关系。我们结合了全球各地地方故事、神话和传说的独特目录，以及国际电影放映和收入数据。首先，我们利用机器学习技术量化电影情节与传统主题之间的相似性。通过比较同一部电影在不同市场的表现，我们确定与当地民间传说更契合的电影系统性地获得更高收入，并且更有可能被放映。其次，我们在美国内部记录了类似的模式。谷歌趋势数据显示，在祖先叙事与电影主题更一致的市场中，兴趣显著更高。第三，我们深入探讨电影传递的明确价值观，重点关注风险描绘和性别角色。在当今创业型社会中，宣扬冒险的电影销量更高，这些社会根植于角色成功追求危险任务的传统。在民间传说中存在类似性别刻板印象、且女性至今仍被置于从属地位的社会中，描绘女性刻板角色的电影继续拥有强大的观众群。这些发现强调了传统叙事对21世纪娱乐模式的持久影响，突显了电影消费与根深蒂固的文化叙事和价值观之间的深刻联系。
32220.meta: Programs：DEV, EFG, POL；JEL：N0, O10, P0, Z00, Z1, Z10, Z11, Z13

32219.title: Navigating by Falling Stars: Monetary Policy with Fiscally Driven Natural Rates
32219.zh_title: 借流星导航：财政驱动自然利率下的货币政策
32219.authors: Rodolfo G. Campos, Jesús Fernández-Villaverde, Galo Nuño, Peter Paz
32219.abstract: We study a new type of monetary-fiscal interaction in a heterogeneous-agent New Keynesian model with a fiscal block. Due to household heterogeneity, the stock of public debt affects the natural interest rate, forcing the central bank to adapt its monetary policy rule to the fiscal stance to guarantee that inflation remains at its target. There is, however, a minimum level of debt below which the steady-state inflation deviates from its target due to the zero lower bound on nominal rates. We analyze the response to a debt-financed fiscal expansion and quantify the impact of different timings in the adaptation of the monetary policy rule, as well as the performance of alternative monetary policy rules that do not require an assessment of the natural rates. We validate our findings with a series of empirical estimates.
32219.zh_abstract: 我们在一个包含财政模块的异质性主体新凯恩斯模型中研究了一种新型货币-财政互动。由于家庭异质性，公共债务存量会影响自然利率，迫使中央银行调整其货币政策规则以适应财政立场，以确保通胀保持在目标水平。然而，存在一个最低债务水平，低于该水平时，由于名义利率的零下限，稳态通胀会偏离目标。我们分析了债务融资财政扩张的响应，量化了货币政策规则调整不同时机的影响，以及不需要评估自然利率的替代货币政策规则的表现。我们通过一系列实证估计验证了我们的发现。

32218.title: Weathering the Storm: Supply Chains and Climate Risk
32218.zh_title: 抵御风暴：供应链与气候风险
32218.authors: Juanma Castro-Vincenzi, Gaurav Khanna, Nicolas Morales, Nitya Pandalai-Nayar
32218.abstract: We characterize how firms structure supply chains under climate risk. Using new data on the universe of firm-to-firm transactions from an Indian state, we show that firms diversify sourcing locations, and that suppliers exposed to climate risk charge lower prices. We develop a general equilibrium spatial model of firm input sourcing under climate risk. Firms diversify identical inputs from suppliers across space, trading off the probability of climate disruptions against higher input costs. We quantify the model using data on 271 Indian regions. Wages are inversely correlated with sourcing risk, giving rise to a cost minimization-resilience tradeoff. Supply chain diversification unambiguously reduces real wage volatility, but ambiguously affects their levels, as diversification may come with high input costs. While diversification mitigates climate risk, it exacerbates the distributional consequences of climate change by reducing wages in regions prone to frequent shocks.
32218.zh_abstract: 我们描述了企业在气候风险下如何构建供应链。利用来自印度一个邦的企业间交易全量新数据，我们表明企业会多样化采购地点，且面临气候风险的供应商会收取更低的价格。我们构建了一个气候风险下企业投入品采购的一般均衡空间模型。企业从不同空间的供应商处多样化采购相同投入品，在气候中断概率与更高投入成本之间进行权衡。我们利用271个印度地区的数据量化了该模型。工资与采购风险呈负相关，这产生了成本最小化与韧性之间的权衡。供应链多样化明确降低了实际工资波动性，但对其水平的影响不明确，因为多样化可能伴随高投入成本。虽然多样化减轻了气候风险，但它通过降低频繁遭受冲击地区居民的工资，加剧了气候变化带来的分配后果。
32218.meta: Programs：DEV, EFG, IFM, ITI；JEL：E0, F0, F10, F18, F40, F62

32217.title: The Feasibility of Using Bayh-Dole March-In Rights to Lower Drug Prices: An Update
32217.zh_title: 利用Bayh-Dole法案介入权降低药品价格的可行性：最新更新
32217.authors: Lisa Larrimore Ouellette, Bhaven N. Sampat
32217.abstract: In December 2023, the Biden-Harris Administration released a proposed framework for exercising government “march-in” rights on high-priced taxpayer-funded drugs. While both proponents and critics of the new rules view them as having broad scope, march-in rights can be exercised only on patents that result from federally funded research, and they can enable generic entry only if all patents on a drug were public-sector patents. In this paper, we examine the feasibility of using march-in rights to lower pharmaceutical prices by examining patents on drugs approved by the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) from 1985 to 2022. Our primary analyses focus on the 883 new molecular entities with at least one patent listed in the FDA’s Orange Book since 1985. While 9 percent of these drugs have a public-sector patent, only 2.5 percent have only public-sector patents. While the new march-in rules could be a tool to lower prices for a few drugs, their overall impact on prices or expenditures will likely be limited. In addition to the updated analyses, we provide links to the data used in the analyses.
32217.zh_abstract: 2023年12月，拜登-哈里斯政府发布了一项拟议框架，旨在对高价纳税人资助的药品行使政府“介入”权。尽管新规则的支持者和批评者都认为其适用范围广泛，但介入权仅能针对由联邦资助研究产生的专利行使，并且只有当药品的所有专利都是公共部门专利时，才能实现仿制药进入。在本文中，我们通过检查1985年至2022年美国食品药品监督管理局批准的药品专利，考察了利用介入权降低药品价格的可行性。我们的主要分析聚焦于自1985年以来在FDA橙皮书中列有至少一项专利的883种新分子实体。虽然这些药品中有9%拥有一项公共部门专利，但仅有2.5%的药品专利全部来自公共部门。尽管新的介入规则可能成为降低少数药品价格的工具，但其对整体价格或支出的影响可能有限。除了更新分析外，我们还提供了分析所用数据的链接。

32216.title: Equilibrium Responses to Price Controls: A Supply-Chain Approach
32216.zh_title: 价格管制的均衡响应：一种供应链方法
32216.abstract: Prices are regulated in many markets, ranging from healthcare to labor to telecommunications. This paper reinterprets the variables in the basic supply-demand model so that both product-definition and quantity are equilibrium outcomes. Specifically, compliance with price controls is achieved by altering the production-factor mix along the supply chain. This approach yields surprising insights into the incidence of price regulations and their effects on the amount of trade. Furthermore, it reveals how many of the short-run effects of price controls can be opposite of what they are in the long run. The supply-chain framework also easily represents business-to-business price controls, which have been more prevalent in policy practice than price-theoretic analysis.
32216.zh_abstract: 价格在许多市场中受到管制，范围从医疗保健到劳动力再到电信。本文重新解释了基本供需模型中的变量，使得产品定义和数量都是均衡结果。具体而言，通过沿供应链改变生产要素组合来实现对价格管制的合规。这种方法为价格管制的影响及其对贸易量的影响提供了令人惊讶的见解。此外，它揭示了价格管制的许多短期效应如何可能与其长期效应相反。供应链框架也易于表示企业间价格管制，这在政策实践中比价格理论分析更为普遍。
32216.meta: Programs：IO, LE, LS, PE；JEL：D41, D57, K2, L51

32215.title: Product Liability Litigation and Innovation: Evidence from Medical Devices
32215.zh_title: 产品责任诉讼与创新：来自医疗器械的证据
32215.abstract: We examine the relationship between product liability litigation and innovation by systematically combining data on product liability lawsuits with data on new product introductions in a panel dataset of leading medical device firms. We first document a decline in the propensity to introduce new products for both defendant firms and other firms operating in litigated device categories. This decline, however, does not spill over to other device categories, and we also do not find any slowing down in firms' patenting activities. We then show that changes in two features of the regulatory environment---(1) the availability of public information regarding adverse events and (2) federal law taking precedence over state law---substantially affect the likelihood of litigation. These changes also provide quasi-exogenous variations in litigation that confirm our baseline findings. Finally, we show that litigation appears to induce firms to develop safer devices. Overall, our findings suggest that product liability litigation affects the rate and direction of technological progress, and that safety regulation and liability regimes interact with one another in significant ways.
32215.zh_abstract: 我们通过系统地将产品责任诉讼数据与领先医疗器械公司面板数据集中的新产品引入数据相结合，考察了产品责任诉讼与创新之间的关系。我们首先发现，对于被告公司以及在被诉讼的器械类别中运营的其他公司，引入新产品的倾向有所下降。然而，这种下降并未溢出到其他器械类别，我们也没有发现公司专利活动有任何放缓。然后，我们表明监管环境两个特征的变化——(1) 关于不良事件的公共信息的可用性，以及 (2) 联邦法律优先于州法律——显著影响诉讼的可能性。这些变化还提供了准外生的诉讼变化，证实了我们的基线发现。最后，我们表明诉讼似乎促使公司开发更安全的器械。总体而言，我们的发现表明产品责任诉讼影响技术进步的速率和方向，并且安全监管与责任制度之间存在显著的相互作用。
32215.meta: Programs：IO, LE, PR；JEL：K13, K41, L51, O32

32214.title: Behavioral Sticky Prices
32214.authors: Sergio Rebelo, Miguel Santana, Pedro Teles
32214.abstract: We develop a model in which households make decisions using a dual-process framework. System 1 relies on fast, intuitive heuristics but is prone to error, while System 2 demands cognitive effort but yields more accurate decisions. Monopolistic firms can influence which system households engage through pricing. This strategic influence creates a novel source of price inertia. The model accounts for the ”rockets and feathers” phenomenon (prices rise quickly but fall slowly), explains why firms with unexpectedly high demand often avoid price changes, and why hazard functions are downward sloping. Our model implies that price stability is not optimal.
32214.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个家庭使用双过程框架进行决策的模型。系统1依赖快速、直观的启发式方法，但容易出错；而系统2需要认知努力，但能产生更准确的决策。垄断企业可以通过定价来影响家庭使用哪个系统。这种策略性影响创造了一种新的价格惯性来源。该模型解释了“火箭与羽毛”现象（价格上涨快但下跌慢），说明了为何意外高需求的企业往往避免改变价格，以及为何风险函数呈向下倾斜。我们的模型表明，价格稳定并非最优选择。

32213.title: The Puzzling Persistence of Financial Crises
32213.zh_title: 金融危机令人费解的持续性
32213.authors: Charles W. Calomiris, Matthew S. Jaremski
32213.abstract: The high social costs of financial crises imply that economists, policymakers, businesses, and households have a tremendous incentive to understand, and try to prevent them. And yet, so far we have failed to learn how to avoid them. In this article, we take a novel approach to studying financial crises. We first build ten case studies of financial crises that stretch over two millennia, and then consider their salient points of differences and commonalities. We see this as the beginning of developing a useful taxonomy of crises – an understanding of the most important factors that reappear across the many examples, which also allows (as in any taxonomy) some examples to be more similar to each other than others. From the perspective of our review of the ten crises, we consider the question of why it has proven so difficult to learn from past crises to avoid future ones.
32213.zh_abstract: 金融危机的巨大社会成本意味着经济学家、政策制定者、企业和家庭有极大的动力去理解并试图预防它们。然而，迄今为止，我们仍未学会如何避免危机。在本文中，我们采用一种新颖的方法来研究金融危机。我们首先构建了跨越两千年的十个金融危机案例研究，然后考察它们之间的显著差异点和共同点。我们将此视为发展一个有用的危机分类法的开端——理解在许多案例中反复出现的最重要因素，这也允许（如同任何分类法一样）某些案例之间比其他案例更为相似。基于我们对这十次危机的回顾，我们探讨了为何从过去的危机中吸取教训以避免未来危机如此困难的问题。

32212.title: Persistent Effects of Social Program Participation on the Third Generation
32212.zh_title: 社会项目参与对第三代的持久影响
32212.abstract: Can participation in safety net programs have long-lasting negative effects across multiple generations? Prior work shows a 1993 Dutch disability insurance reform which tightened requirements and lowered benefits for participants resulted in better outcomes for their children. We study the third generation, finding that grandchildren of individuals whose DI eligibility and benefits were reduced are less likely to be born premature, have low birthweight, or experience complicated deliveries. They also have better health and schooling outcomes during early childhood. These early-life improvements are consequential, as they have been linked to better health, education, and labor market outcomes in adulthood.
32212.zh_abstract: 安全网项目的参与是否会对多代人产生长期的负面影响？先前的研究表明，1993年荷兰的一项残疾保险改革（收紧了参与条件并降低了福利）使参与者的子女获得了更好的结果。我们研究了第三代，发现那些其残疾保险资格和福利被削减的个人的孙辈，出生时早产、低出生体重或经历复杂分娩的可能性更低。他们在幼儿期的健康和学业成果也更好。这些早期生活的改善意义重大，因为它们与成年后更好的健康、教育和劳动力市场结果相关联。

32211.title: A Housing Portfolio Channel of QE Transmission
32211.zh_title: 量化宽松传导的住房投资组合渠道
32211.authors: Dominik Boddin, Daniel Marcel te Kaat, Chang Ma, Alessandro Rebucci
32211.abstract: We document a housing portfolio channel of quantitative easing (QE) transmission exploiting variation in German household data in a difference-in-differences setting around QE adoption in 2015. We find that QE encourages households with larger initial bond positions to rebalance more toward second homes. Rebalancing is especially pronounced among higher-income and church-affiliated households with stronger tax incentives to purchase and rent out properties. We also show that, in regions more exposed to this channel, house prices increase more than rents, and sale listings decrease more than rental ones, suggesting that the rental supply may increase in response to QE.
32211.zh_abstract: 我们利用德国住户数据的差异，在2015年量化宽松政策实施前后的双重差分设定中，记录了量化宽松传导的一个住房投资组合渠道。我们发现，量化宽松鼓励初始债券头寸较大的家庭更多地重新平衡其资产，转向第二套住房。这种重新平衡在收入较高和有教会背景的家庭中尤为明显，这些家庭有更强的税收激励去购买和出租房产。我们还表明，在受此渠道影响更大的地区，房价相对于租金上涨更多，而待售房源相对于待租房源减少更多，这表明租赁供应可能因量化宽松而增加。

32210.title: Portfolio Flows and Household Portfolios
32210.zh_title: 跨境投资组合流动与家庭资产组合
32210.authors: Daniel Marcel te Kaat, Chang Ma, Alessandro Rebucci
32210.abstract: In this paper, we show that cross-border portfolio flows around the peak of the European Crisis induced households to rebalance their portfolios toward housing. Estimating difference-in-differences regressions around Draghi's “Whatever It Take” speech in July 2012 with household data from the ECB's Household Finance and Consumption Survey, we find that portfolio inflows induce households with larger ex-ante bond and equity shares to rebalance more strongly toward housing. The effect is not driven by higher pre-treatment access to credit or higher credit growth during the treatment period and is stronger for wealthier and less risk-averse households.
32210.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们表明，在欧洲危机高峰时期，跨境投资组合流动促使家庭将其资产组合重新平衡至住房。我们利用欧洲央行家庭金融与消费调查中的家庭数据，围绕德拉吉2012年7月“不惜一切代价”演讲进行双重差分回归估计，发现投资组合流入促使事前债券和股票份额较大的家庭更强烈地向住房重新平衡。这种效应并非由处理前更高的信贷可得性或处理期间更高的信贷增长所驱动，并且对于更富有和风险厌恶程度较低的家庭更为显著。

32209.title: Housing Speculation, GSEs, and Credit Market Spillovers
32209.zh_title: 住房投机、政府赞助企业与信贷市场溢出效应
32209.authors: Natee Amornsiripanitch, Philip E. Strahan, Song Zhang, Xiang Zheng
32209.abstract: In 2021, the U.S. Treasury reduced Government Sponsored Enterprises (GSEs) exposure to speculative mortgages. As a result, GSE purchases fell by about 20 percentage points. The policy reduced credit to speculative investors in housing, but increased credit to unaffected parts of the conforming-mortgage market. Banks responded by reallocating provision of speculative mortgage credit across their local markets, which in turn affected their provision of small business credit. These adjustments are most pronounced where banks do not own branches. The results suggest that banks manage credit provision not only in a macro sense – the focus of most research – but also market-by-market.
32209.zh_abstract: 2021年，美国财政部减少了政府赞助企业对投机性抵押贷款的敞口。结果，政府赞助企业的购买量下降了约20个百分点。该政策减少了向住房投机性投资者的信贷，但增加了向合规抵押贷款市场未受影响部分的信贷。银行通过在其本地市场之间重新分配投机性抵押贷款信贷的供给来应对，这进而影响了它们对小企业信贷的供给。这些调整在银行没有分支机构的地区最为明显。结果表明，银行不仅在宏观意义上管理信贷供给（这是大多数研究的焦点），而且还在逐个市场的基础上进行管理。

32208.title: Do People Report Happiness Accurately?
32208.zh_title: 人们准确报告幸福感吗？
32208.authors: James Andreoni, B. Douglas Bernheim, Tingyan Jia
32208.abstract: Validation of happiness measures is inherently challenging because subjective sensations are unobserved. We introduce a novel validation method: subjects report how happy they would feel (or did feel) after some specified event, as well as how they would respond (or would have responded) to a survey question about their happiness after the same event. The difference between these two responses measures “self-reported misreporting.” We demonstrate that self-reported misreporting varies across events and is substantial for certain types of events. These findings imply that caution is warranted when interpreting differences in self-reported well-being across contexts.
32208.zh_abstract: 幸福感测量的验证本质上具有挑战性，因为主观感受是无法观测的。我们引入了一种新颖的验证方法：受试者报告他们在某个特定事件后（或将会）感到多幸福，以及他们在同一事件后（或将会）如何回答一个关于其幸福感的调查问题。这两个回答之间的差异衡量了“自我报告的误报”。我们证明，自我报告的误报因事件而异，并且对于某些类型的事件而言是显著的。这些发现意味着，在解释不同情境下自我报告幸福感的差异时应保持谨慎。

32258.title: Tunneling and Hidden Profits in Health Care
32258.zh_title: 医疗保健中的利益输送与隐藏利润
32258.abstract: This study examines whether healthcare providers tunnel profits and assets to commonly-owned related parties by making inflated payments for their goods and services. Such practices allow providers to understate their profitability—which may encourage regulators to increase reimbursements and relax quality standards—and shield assets from malpractice liability. Using uniquely detailed nursing home financial data, we find evidence of widespread tunneling to related-party real estate and management companies. Our estimates suggest that 68% of nursing home profits are tunneled to related parties and that accounting for tunneled profits and assets raises the implied typical investment IRR from 4.83% to 13.11%.
32258.zh_abstract: 本研究考察了医疗保健提供者是否通过向共同拥有的关联方支付虚高的商品和服务费用，从而向其输送利润和资产。这种做法使提供者能够低估其盈利能力——这可能会鼓励监管机构提高报销标准和放宽质量标准——并将资产从医疗事故责任中隔离出来。利用极其详细的养老院财务数据，我们发现了向关联方房地产和管理公司进行广泛利益输送的证据。我们的估计表明，68%的养老院利润被输送给关联方，而将输送的利润和资产考虑在内后，隐含的典型投资内部收益率从4.83%提高到13.11%。

32257.title: Restrictions on Municipal Broadband Provision and Mothers’ Labor Market Outcomes: Evidence from the COVID-19 Pandemic
32257.zh_title: 市政宽带限制对新冠疫情劳动力市场结果的影响
32257.authors: Saket S. Hegde, Jessica Van Parys
32257.abstract: The COVID-19 pandemic initiated a trend in “work-from-home (WFH),” but workers need reliable and fast internet connections (e.g., broadband) to work from home. Yet, as of January 2020, 18 states had legally restricted local governments and cooperatives from building their own broadband infrastructure and/or providing broadband internet to their communities. Such policies reduced broadband access and competition in states with restrictions compared to states without restrictions leading up to the pandemic (Whitacre and Gallardo 2020). We use CPS data from 2018-2023 to estimate a dynamic difference-in-differences model that shows how labor force participation (LFP) rates changed in states with and without broadband restrictions, before and after the COVID-19 pandemic. We focus on married women with children, a population with more elastic labor supply that may especially value the flexibility that WFH offers (Dettling 2017). We find that married mothers’ LFP and employment decreased by 1.7% and 2.2%, respectively, in states with restrictions after the pandemic compared to states without restrictions. Labor force outcomes for women without children and married men with children were unaffected by broadband restrictions. The results suggest that married women with children were less able to remain in the workforce in states where their ability to WFH was limited by broadband restrictions.
32257.zh_abstract: 新冠疫情开启了一种“居家办公”的趋势，但工人需要可靠且快速的互联网连接（例如宽带）才能在家工作。然而，截至2020年1月，有18个州在法律上限制了地方政府和合作社自行建设宽带基础设施和/或向其社区提供宽带互联网。与没有限制的州相比，此类政策在疫情前减少了有限制州的宽带接入和竞争（Whitacre and Gallardo 2020）。我们使用2018-2023年的当前人口调查数据来估计一个动态双重差分模型，该模型展示了在新冠疫情前后，有和没有宽带限制的州的劳动力参与率如何变化。我们重点关注有孩子的已婚女性，这是一个劳动力供给弹性更大、可能特别看重居家办公所提供的灵活性的群体（Dettling 2017）。我们发现，与没有限制的州相比，在疫情后有限制州的州，已婚母亲的劳动力参与率和就业率分别下降了1.7%和2.2%。没有孩子的女性和有孩子的已婚男性的劳动力市场结果未受宽带限制的影响。结果表明，在宽带限制限制了她们居家办公能力的州，有孩子的已婚女性更难以留在劳动力队伍中。

32256.title: Banks in Space
32256.authors: Ezra Oberfield, Esteban Rossi-Hansberg, Nicholas Trachter, Derek T. Wenning
32256.abstract: We study the spatial expansion of banks in response to banking deregulation in the 1980s and 90s. During this period, large banks expanded rapidly, mostly by adding new branches in new locations, while many small banks exited. We document that large banks sorted into the densest markets, but that sorting weakened over time as large banks expanded to more marginal markets in search of locations with a relative abundance of retail deposits. This allowed large banks to reduce their dependence on expensive wholesale funding and grow further. To rationalize these patterns we propose a theory of multi-branch banks that sort into heterogeneous locations. Our theory yields two forms of sorting. First, span-of-control sorting incentivizes top firms to select the largest markets and smaller banks the more marginal ones. Second, mismatch sorting incentivizes banks to locate in more marginal locations, where deposits are abundant relative to loan demand, to better align their deposits and loans and minimize wholesale funding. Together, these two forms of sorting account well for the sorting patterns we document in the data.
32256.zh_abstract: 我们研究了20世纪80年代和90年代银行业放松管制后银行的空间扩张。在此期间，大型银行迅速扩张，主要通过在新地点增设新分行，而许多小银行则退出了市场。我们记录了大型银行向最密集市场聚集的现象，但这种聚集随时间推移而减弱，因为大型银行扩张到更边缘的市场，寻找零售存款相对充裕的地点。这使得大型银行能够减少对昂贵批发融资的依赖并进一步增长。为了合理化这些模式，我们提出了一个多分行银行理论，这些银行会聚集到异质性地点。我们的理论产生了两种聚集形式。首先，控制跨度聚集激励顶级公司选择最大的市场，而较小的银行则选择更边缘的市场。其次，错配聚集激励银行定位于更边缘的地点，即存款相对于贷款需求充裕的地方，以更好地匹配其存款和贷款并最小化批发融资。这两种聚集形式共同很好地解释了我们在数据中记录的聚集模式。
32256.meta: Programs：CF, EFG, IO, ITI；JEL：D20, G21, G24, L23, L25, R12, R19

32255.title: Scenarios for the Transition to AGI
32255.zh_title: 向通用人工智能过渡的情景
32255.abstract: We analyze how output and wages behave under different scenarios for technological progress that may culminate in Artificial General Intelligence (AGI), defined as the ability of AI systems to perform all tasks that humans can perform. We assume that human work can be decomposed into atomistic tasks that differ in their complexity. Advances in technology make ever more complex tasks amenable to automation. The effects on wages depend on a race between automation and capital accumulation. If automation proceeds sufficiently slowly, then there is always enough work for humans, and wages may rise forever. By contrast, if the complexity of tasks that humans can perform is bounded and full automation is reached, then wages collapse. But declines may occur even before if large-scale automation outpaces capital accumulation and makes labor too abundant. Automating productivity growth may lead to broad-based gains in the returns to all factors. By contrast, bottlenecks to growth from irreproducible scarce factors may exacerbate the decline in wages.
32255.zh_abstract: 我们分析了在可能最终实现通用人工智能的技术进步的不同情景下，产出和工资如何变化。通用人工智能被定义为人工智能系统能够执行人类所能执行的所有任务的能力。我们假设人类工作可以分解为原子化任务，这些任务在复杂性上有所不同。技术进步使得越来越复杂的任务变得适合自动化。对工资的影响取决于自动化与资本积累之间的竞赛。如果自动化进展足够缓慢，那么人类总有足够的工作可做，工资可能会永远上涨。相反，如果人类能执行的任务的复杂性存在上限，并且实现了完全自动化，那么工资就会崩溃。但即使在完全自动化之前，如果大规模自动化超过资本积累并使劳动力过于充裕，工资也可能下降。自动化带来的生产率增长可能导致所有要素回报的广泛增长。相反，来自不可复制的稀缺要素的增长瓶颈可能会加剧工资的下降。
32255.meta: Programs：DAE, EFG, LS, PR；JEL：E24, J23, J24, O33, O41

32254.title: Regulation of Access, Pricing, and Planning of High Voltage Transmission in the U.S.
32254.zh_title: 美国高压输电的准入、定价与规划监管
32254.authors: Joe DeLosa III, Johannes P. Pfeifenberger, Paul Joskow
32254.abstract: The U.S. regulation of high-voltage transmission is highly complex and, as a result, generally poorly understood. The complexity is created by separate, but overlapping, jurisdictional authorities of the U.S. federal regulators and those of individual states, districts, and territories. While U.S. federal regulators have authority over stand-alone transmission service and the regional wholesale power markets that use the transmission grid, state regulators have jurisdiction over both (1) retail electricity services that include the distribution network, the retail cost of transmission service, and often generation service; and (2) the permitting of most new transmission facilities within their states’ boundaries. Some of these federal and state regulatory authorities overlap and some of them do not apply to non-jurisdictional transmission providers (such as certain municipal utilities, cooperatives, and federal power marketing agencies) and states (such as Texas) that are not synchronized with the larger regional grid. We summarize this complex structure of transmission regulation in the U.S. and the history of regulations that have created the industry structure and regulatory frameworks that exist today. We provide an overview of how transmission investments are priced and recovered and the planning processes that individual transmission owners and regional grid operators use to plan the necessary expansion of the high-voltage transmission grid. We also point out some of the economic inefficiencies that are created by a combination of balkanized regulatory structures and outdated industry planning practices.
32254.zh_abstract: 美国对高压输电的监管极为复杂，因此通常难以被充分理解。这种复杂性源于美国联邦监管机构与各州、地区和领地监管机构之间相互独立但又存在重叠的管辖权。联邦监管机构对独立输电服务以及使用输电网络的区域批发电力市场拥有管辖权，而州监管机构则对以下两方面拥有管辖权：（1）包含配电网络、输电服务零售成本以及通常还包括发电服务的零售电力服务；（2）其州界内大多数新建输电设施的许可审批。这些联邦和州监管权力有些相互重叠，有些则不适用于非管辖范围内的输电供应商（例如某些市政公用事业、合作社和联邦电力营销机构）以及不与更大区域电网同步的州（例如得克萨斯州）。我们总结了美国这种复杂的输电监管结构，以及造就了当今行业结构和监管框架的监管历史。我们概述了输电投资如何定价和回收，以及各个输电业主和区域电网运营商用于规划高压输电网络必要扩建的规划流程。我们还指出了碎片化的监管结构与过时的行业规划实践相结合所造成的一些经济低效问题。

32253.title: The Household Equipment Revolution
32253.authors: Effrosyni Adamopoulou, Jeremy Greenwood, Nezih Guner
32253.abstract: A brief historical overview of the household equipment revolution and the women who transformed the home in Germany and the United States.
32253.zh_abstract: 本文简要概述了家用设备革命以及那些在德国和美国改变了家庭面貌的女性。
32253.meta: Programs：EFG, LS, PR；JEL：B31, D13, J22, N32, N34

32252.title: Re-assessing the Spatial Mismatch Hypothesis
32252.zh_title: 重新评估空间错配假说
32252.authors: David Card, Jesse Rothstein, Moises Yi
32252.abstract: We use detailed location information from the Longitudinal Employer-Household Dynamics (LEHD) database to develop new evidence on the effects of spatial mismatch on the relative earnings of Black workers in large US cities. We classify workplaces by the size of the pay premiums they offer in a two-way fixed effects model, providing a simple metric for defining “good” jobs. We show that: (a) Black workers earn nearly the same average wage premiums as whites; (b) in most cities Black workers live closer to jobs, and closer to good jobs, than do whites; (c) Black workers typically commute shorter distances than whites; and (d) people who commute further earn higher average pay premiums, but the elasticity with respect to distance traveled is slightly lower for Black workers. We conclude that geographic proximity to good jobs is unlikely to be a major source of the racial earnings gaps in major U.S. cities today.
32252.zh_abstract: 我们利用纵向雇主-家庭动态数据库（LEHD）中的详细位置信息，就空间错配对美国大城市黑人劳动者相对收入的影响提供了新的证据。我们在一个双向固定效应模型中，根据工作场所提供的薪酬溢价大小对其进行分类，从而为定义“好”工作提供了一个简单的衡量标准。我们表明：（a）黑人劳动者的平均工资溢价几乎与白人相同；（b）在大多数城市，黑人劳动者比白人居住地更靠近工作地点，也更靠近好工作；（c）黑人劳动者的通勤距离通常比白人短；（d）通勤距离更远的人获得的平均薪酬溢价更高，但黑人劳动者相对于通勤距离的弹性略低。我们得出结论，地理上靠近好工作不太可能是当今美国主要城市种族收入差距的主要来源。

32251.title: Non-robustness of Diffusion Estimates on Networks with Measurement Error
32251.zh_title: 存在测量误差的网络扩散估计的非稳健性
32251.authors: Arun G. Chandrasekhar, Paul Goldsmith-Pinkham, Tyler McCormick, Samuel A. Thau, Jerry Wei
32251.abstract: Network diffusion models are used to study things like disease transmission, information spread, and technology adoption. However, small amounts of mismeasurement are extremely likely in the networks constructed to operationalize these models. We show that estimates of diffusions are highly non-robust to this measurement error. First, we show that even when measurement error is vanishingly small, such that the share of missed links is close to zero, forecasts about the extent of diffusion will greatly underestimate the truth. Second, a small mismeasurement in the identity of the initial seed generates a large shift in the locations of expected diffusion path. We show that both of these results still hold when the vanishing measurement error is only local in nature. Such non-robustness in forecasting exists even under conditions where the basic reproductive number is consistently estimable. Possible solutions, such as estimating the measurement error or implementing widespread detection efforts, still face difficulties because the number of missed links are so small. Finally, we conduct Monte Carlo simulations on simulated networks, and real networks from three settings: travel data from the COVID-19 pandemic in the western US, a mobile phone marketing campaign in rural India, and in an insurance experiment in China.
32251.zh_abstract: 网络扩散模型被用于研究疾病传播、信息扩散和技术采用等现象。然而，在为实现这些模型而构建的网络中，出现少量测量误差的可能性极高。我们表明，扩散估计对这些测量误差高度不稳健。首先，我们证明，即使测量误差小到可以忽略不计，以至于遗漏链接的比例接近于零，关于扩散程度的预测也会严重低估真实情况。其次，初始种子节点身份的一个微小测量误差会导致预期扩散路径位置发生巨大偏移。我们表明，即使这种可忽略的测量误差仅具有局部性质，这两个结果仍然成立。即使在基本再生数可以被一致估计的条件下，这种预测的非稳健性依然存在。可能的解决方案，例如估计测量误差或实施广泛的检测工作，仍然面临困难，因为遗漏的链接数量非常少。最后，我们在模拟网络以及来自三个真实场景的网络（美国西部COVID-19大流行期间的旅行数据、印度农村的一次手机营销活动以及中国的一个保险实验）上进行了蒙特卡洛模拟。
32251.meta: Programs：DEV, EFG, ME, PR；JEL：C01, D85, E0

32250.title: Size Matters: Matching Externalities and the Advantages of Large Labor Markets
32250.zh_title: 规模重要：匹配外部性与大型劳动力市场的优势
32250.abstract: Economists have long hypothesized that large and thick labor markets facilitate the matching between workers and firms. We use administrative data from the LEHD to compare the job search outcomes of workers originally in large and small markets who lost their jobs due to a firm closure. We define a labor market as the Commuting Zone×industry pair in the quarter before the closure. To account for the possible sorting of high-quality workers into larger markets, the effect of market size is identified by comparing workers in large and small markets within the same CZ, conditional on workers fixed effects. In the six quarters before their firm’s closure, workers in small and large markets have a similar probability of employment and quarterly earnings. Following the closure, workers in larger markets experience significantly shorter non-employment spells and smaller earning losses than workers in smaller markets, indicating that larger markets partially insure workers against idiosyncratic employment shocks. A 1 percent increase in market size results in a 0.015 and 0.023 percentage points increase in the 1-year re-employment probability of high school and college graduates, respectively. Displaced workers in larger markets also experience a significantly lower need for relocation to a different CZ. Conditional on finding a new job, the quality of the new worker-firm match is higher in larger markets, as proxied by a higher probability that the new match lasts more than one year; the new industry is the same as the old one; and the new industry is a “good fit” for the worker’s college major. Consistent with the notion that market size should be particularly consequential for more specialized workers, we find that the effects are larger in industries where human capital is more specialized and less portable. Our findings may help explain the geographical agglomeration of industries--especially those that make intensive use of highly specialized workers--and validate one of the mechanisms that urban economists have proposed for the existence of agglomeration economies.
32250.zh_abstract: 经济学家长期以来假设，大型且厚实的劳动力市场有助于促进工人与企业之间的匹配。我们使用LEHD的行政数据，比较了原本处于大型和小型市场中因企业倒闭而失业的工人的求职结果。我们将劳动力市场定义为倒闭前一个季度的通勤区×行业配对。为了考虑高质量工人可能向大型市场自选择的问题，我们通过比较同一通勤区内大型和小型市场的工人，并控制工人固定效应，来识别市场规模效应。在企业倒闭前的六个季度，小型和大型市场的工人具有相似的就业概率和季度收入。在企业倒闭后，大型市场的工人经历的非就业期显著更短，收入损失也小于小型市场的工人，这表明大型市场为工人提供了部分抵御特殊就业冲击的保障。市场规模每增加1%，高中和大学毕业生的一年内再就业概率分别提高0.015和0.023个百分点。大型市场中的失业工人搬迁到不同通勤区的需求也显著更低。在找到新工作的条件下，大型市场中新的工人-企业匹配质量更高，其代理指标包括新匹配持续超过一年的概率更高、新行业与旧行业相同、以及新行业与工人的大学专业“匹配良好”。与市场规模对更专业化工人影响尤为显著的观念一致，我们发现，在人力资本更专业化且可移植性更低的行业中，这种效应更大。我们的发现可能有助于解释产业的地理集聚现象——尤其是那些密集使用高度专业化工人的产业——并验证了城市经济学家提出的关于集聚经济存在的一种机制。

32249.title: The Effect of Price Caps on Advertising to Physicians: Evidence from the 340b Drug Pricing Program
32249.zh_title: 价格上限对医生广告的影响：来自340b药品定价计划的证据
32249.authors: Sylvia Hristakeva, Julie Holland Mortimer, Eric Yde
32249.abstract: We study the effect of price caps on the provision of costly effort by pharmaceutical firms using variation in drug discounts generated by a price regulation program that allows eligible hospitals to purchase outpatient drugs at steep discounts. These discounts directly affect drug manufacturers’ markups, and may change firms’ incentives to exert promotional effort targeted towards physicians at these hospitals. We find that the effects of price regulation on pharmaceutical firm effort depend crucially on the design of the regulations. Using detailed data on marketing payments from pharmaceutical firms to physicians, we observe that physicians receive 13% fewer promotional payments after their hospitals take up the program. The design of the price caps imply that discounts tend to increase with a drug’s age. Consistent with theoretical predictions, we find that pharmaceutical firms shift promotional payments away from older drugs and towards newer drugs, which are less affected by the price caps. Understanding these strategic, non-price adjustments is important for policymakers seeking to design effective regulations targeting specific products.
32249.zh_abstract: 我们利用一项价格监管计划产生的药品折扣变化，研究了价格上限对制药公司提供昂贵努力的影响。该计划允许符合条件的医院以大幅折扣购买门诊药品。这些折扣直接影响药品制造商的加价，并可能改变公司向这些医院医生进行促销努力的激励。我们发现，价格监管对制药公司努力的影响关键取决于监管的设计。利用制药公司向医生支付营销费用的详细数据，我们观察到，在医生所在的医院加入该计划后，他们收到的促销付款减少了13%。价格上限的设计意味着折扣通常随着药品上市时间的增长而增加。与理论预测一致，我们发现制药公司将促销付款从老药转向受价格上限影响较小的新药。理解这些战略性的非价格调整，对于旨在设计针对特定产品的有效监管政策的决策者来说至关重要。
32249.meta: Programs：IO；JEL：I1, I11, L0, L2, M30, M37, M39

32248.title: Asset Demand and Real Interest Rates
32248.authors: Paul Beaudry, Katya Kartashova, Césaire Meh
32248.abstract: Understanding factors that drive asset demand is central to explaining movements in long-term real interest rates. In this paper, we begin by documenting that much of the increase in the demand for assets in the US in the 30 years prior to Covid represented greater desire to hold assets by households of given age and income levels. For example, if we focus on the 55-64 age group, its wealth-to-income ratio increased by 45-55%, depending on whether housing is included or not. We then develop a model of asset demands which combines retirement motives and inter-temporal substitution motives to quantitatively explore different factors that may have contributed to such an increase. Our findings suggest that decreasing interest rates likely led to a substantial increase in demand for retirement wealth. We also explore some of the across group heterogeneity and show how social security may explain why the lowest income groups did not follow the general trend. Finally, we discuss macroeconomic implications of long-run asset demands that are a decreasing function of interest rates.
32248.zh_abstract: 理解驱动资产需求的因素对于解释长期实际利率的变动至关重要。在本文中，我们首先记录到，在新冠疫情之前的30年里，美国资产需求的增长很大程度上反映了特定年龄和收入水平的家庭持有资产的意愿增强。例如，如果我们关注55-64岁年龄组，其财富收入比增加了45-55%，具体取决于是否包含住房。然后，我们开发了一个结合退休动机和跨期替代动机的资产需求模型，以定量探索可能导致这种增长的不同因素。我们的研究结果表明，利率下降很可能导致了对退休财富需求的显著增加。我们还探讨了部分群体间的异质性，并展示了社会保障如何可能解释为什么最低收入群体没有遵循总体趋势。最后，我们讨论了长期资产需求（作为利率的递减函数）的宏观经济含义。

32247.title: Technological Synergies, Heterogeneous Firms, and Uncertainty Shocks
32247.zh_title: 技术协同效应、异质性企业与不确定性冲击
32247.authors: Jesús Fernández-Villaverde, Yang Yu, Francesco Zanetti
32247.abstract: This paper examines the role of technological synergies among heterogeneous firms in business cycle fluctuations. We first document six empirical facts using microdata, revealing strong synergies, positive assortative matching, and their cyclical variations. Next, we embed these synergies into a quantitative business cycle model calibrated to firm-level data, showing that frictions in forming and dissolving trading relationships lead to imperfect sorting with significant macro effects. Specifically, we demonstrate that, in the presence of technological synergies, uncertainty shocks reduce aggregate output even without nonconvex adjustment costs, nominal rigidities, or financial frictions.
32247.zh_abstract: 本文研究了异质性企业间的技术协同效应在商业周期波动中的作用。我们首先利用微观数据记录了六个经验事实，揭示了强大的协同效应、正向分类匹配及其周期性变化。接着，我们将这些协同效应嵌入到一个根据企业层面数据校准的定量商业周期模型中，表明在形成和解除交易关系中的摩擦会导致不完美的分类匹配，并产生显著的宏观效应。具体而言，我们证明，在存在技术协同效应的情况下，即使没有非凸调整成本、名义刚性或金融摩擦，不确定性冲击也会降低总产出。

32246.title: On the Spatial Determinants of Educational Access
32246.zh_title: 教育可及性的空间决定因素研究
32246.authors: Francesco Agostinelli, Margaux Luflade, Paolo Martellini
32246.abstract: We define educational access as the component of a neighborhood's value that is determined by the set of schools available to its residents. This paper studies the extent to which educational access is determined by sorting based on heterogeneous preferences over school attributes, or local institutions that constrain residential location and school choice---such as school catchment areas and housing regulation. We develop a spatial equilibrium model of residential sorting and school choice, estimated using data from a large school district in the United States. The model replicates the responses of house prices and school enrollment to quasi-experimental variation in school peer composition and school transportation provision. We find that low-income families prioritize proximity to schools while high-income families and families with high-skilled children place more value on school peer composition. We use the model to evaluate how the geography of neighborhood sorting influences the aggregate and distributional outcomes of a school-choice expansion (place-based) and a housing voucher (people-based) policy. We find that both policies result in net welfare losses, with only marginal improvements in school peer composition for the average low-income family. Although eligible families benefit from these policies, the negative impact falls on families who currently invest in their children's education by residing in expensive neighborhoods. Under both policies, higher-income families are less exposed to the inflow of low-income children into their schools, either because of their longer distance from target neighborhoods or because of the cost imposed by residential zoning regulation on voucher recipients.
32246.zh_abstract: 我们将教育可及性定义为社区价值中由居民可获得的学校集合所决定的部分。本文研究教育可及性在多大程度上取决于对学校属性的异质性偏好所导致的居住分选，或取决于限制居住地点和学校选择的本地制度——例如学区划分和住房监管。我们构建了一个居住分选与学校选择的空间均衡模型，并使用美国某大学区的数据进行估计。该模型能够复现房价和学校入学率对学校同伴构成和学校交通供给的准实验性变化的反应。我们发现，低收入家庭优先考虑学校邻近性，而高收入家庭和高技能子女家庭则更看重学校同伴构成。我们利用该模型评估了邻里分选的地理格局如何影响一项学校选择扩展政策（基于地点）和一项住房券政策（基于人群）的总体和分配结果。我们发现，这两项政策均导致净福利损失，且对普通低收入家庭而言，学校同伴构成的改善微乎其微。尽管符合条件的家庭从这些政策中受益，但负面影响落在了那些目前通过居住在昂贵社区来投资子女教育的家庭身上。在这两项政策下，高收入家庭较少受到低收入儿童涌入其学校的影响，这要么是因为他们距离目标社区较远，要么是因为居住分区监管对住房券领取者施加了成本。
32246.meta: Programs：CH, ED, EFG, LS, PE；JEL：I24, J13, R23, R31

32245.title: Spillovers and Spillbacks
32245.abstract: We study international monetary policy spillovers and spillbacks in a tractable two-country Heterogeneous Agent New Keynesian model. Relative to Representative Agent (RANK) models, our framework introduces a precautionary-savings channel, as households in both countries face uninsurable income risk, and a real-income channel, as households have heterogeneous marginal propensities to consume (MPC). While both channels amplify the size of spillovers/spillbacks, only precautionary savings can change their sign relative to RANK. Spillovers are likely to be larger in economies with higher fractions of high MPC households and more countercyclical income risk. Quantitatively, both channels amplify spillovers by 30-60% relative to RANK.
32245.zh_abstract: 我们在一个易于处理的两国异质性主体新凯恩斯模型中研究国际货币政策溢出效应与回溢效应。相对于代表性主体模型，我们的框架引入了预防性储蓄渠道（因为两国居民都面临不可保险的收入风险）和实际收入渠道（因为居民具有异质性的边际消费倾向）。虽然这两个渠道都放大了溢出/回溢效应的规模，但只有预防性储蓄才能改变其相对于代表性主体模型的符号。在高边际消费倾向家庭比例更高、收入风险更反周期的经济体中，溢出效应可能更大。定量分析表明，相对于代表性主体模型，这两个渠道将溢出效应放大了30-60%。

32244.title: Adaptation Using Financial Markets: Climate Risk Diversification through Securitization
32244.zh_title: 利用金融市场进行适应：通过证券化实现气候风险分散化
32244.authors: Matthew E. Kahn, Amine Ouazad, Erkan Yönder
32244.abstract: In the face of rising climate risk, financial institutions may adapt by transferring such risk to securitizers that have the skill and expertise to build diversified pools, such as Mortgage-Backed Securities. In diversified pools, exposure to climate risk may have a small impact on performance metrics such as deal losses, yield-to-maturity, and total returns, depending on the degree of spatial correlation and concentration. This paper builds a data set of the securitization chain from mortgage-level to MBS deal-level cash flows. Wildfires lead to higher rates of prepayment and foreclosure at the mortgage level, and larger losses during foreclosure sales. At the MBS deal level, a lower spatial concentration of dollar balances (lower spatial dollar Herfindahl), a lower spatial correlation in wildfire events (within-deal correlation), leads to a lower exposure to wildfire events. These quantifiable metrics of diversification identify those existing deals whose design makes them resilient to climate change. This paper builds optimal deals by finding the portfolio weights in a mean-variance framework that trades off return and risk. Extrapolating wildfire risk using a wildfire probability model and temperature projections in 2050, the paper provides and implements a portfolio diversification algorithm that builds climate-resilient MBSs whose returns are minimally impacted by wildfire risk even as they supply mortgage credit to wildfire prone areas.
32244.zh_abstract: 面对日益加剧的气候风险，金融机构可能通过将此类风险转移给具备技能和专业知识来构建多元化资产池的证券化机构（例如住房抵押贷款支持证券）来进行适应。在多元化的资产池中，气候风险暴露对交易损失、到期收益率和总回报等绩效指标的影响可能较小，具体取决于空间相关性和集中度。本文构建了一个从抵押贷款层面到住房抵押贷款支持证券交易层面现金流的数据集。野火导致抵押贷款层面的提前还款和止赎率上升，并在止赎销售中造成更大损失。在住房抵押贷款支持证券交易层面，美元余额的空间集中度较低（较低的空间美元赫芬达尔指数）、野火事件的空间相关性较低（交易内相关性），导致对野火事件的暴露程度较低。这些可量化的分散化指标识别出了那些设计上对气候变化具有韧性的现有交易。本文通过均值-方差框架中权衡回报与风险的组合权重来构建最优交易。利用野火概率模型和2050年温度预测来外推野火风险，本文提出并实施了一种组合分散化算法，以构建具有气候韧性的住房抵押贷款支持证券，即使它们为野火易发地区提供抵押贷款信贷，其回报也受野火风险影响最小。

32243.title: Community Engagement with Law Enforcement after High-profile Acts of Police Violence
32243.zh_title: 高调警察暴力事件后社区与执法部门的互动
32243.authors: Desmond Ang, Panka Bencsik, Jesse M. Bruhn, Ellora Derenoncourt
32243.abstract: We document a sharp rise in gunshots coupled with declining 911 call volume across thirteen major US cities in the aftermath of the murder of George Floyd. National survey data also indicate that victims of crime became less likely to report their victimization to law enforcement due to mistrust of police. Our results suggest that high-profile acts of police violence may erode community engagement with law enforcement and highlight the call-to-shot ratio as a natural measure of attitudes towards the police.
32243.zh_abstract: 我们记录了乔治·弗洛伊德谋杀案发生后，美国十三个主要城市的枪击事件急剧增加，同时911报警电话数量下降。全国调查数据还表明，犯罪受害者因不信任警察而向执法部门报告受害情况的意愿降低。我们的结果表明，高调的警察暴力事件可能会削弱社区与执法部门的互动，并突显了报警与枪击比率作为衡量对警察态度的一个自然指标。

32242.title: Competing Narratives in Action: An Empirical Analysis of Model Adoption Dynamics
32242.zh_title: 行动中的竞争性叙事：模型采纳动态的实证分析
32242.authors: Marco Angrisani, Anya Samek, Ricardo Serrano-Padial
32242.abstract: We use a longitudinal dataset measuring beliefs and behaviors to study the dynamics of model – or narrative – adoption during the Covid-19 pandemic. We show that individuals switch beliefs about the effectiveness of preventive behaviors following changes in perceived risk. The adoption of narratives promoting preventive behaviors is procyclical and narrative switching is influenced by exposure to conflicting information. We explain the data using a heterogeneous-agent model of competing narratives in which agents exhibit motivated beliefs. Adopting misspecified narratives increases infection rates, highlighting the importance of promoting accurate beliefs to guide behavior in the presence of novel risks.
32242.zh_abstract: 我们利用一个测量信念和行为的纵向数据集，研究新冠疫情期间模型（或叙事）采纳的动态过程。我们表明，个体在感知风险发生变化后会改变关于预防行为有效性的信念。推广预防行为的叙事采纳是顺周期的，叙事转换受到接触冲突信息的影响。我们使用一个包含动机信念的异质性主体竞争性叙事模型来解释这些数据。采纳错误设定的叙事会增加感染率，这凸显了在面对新型风险时，推广准确信念以指导行为的重要性。

32241.title: Can VAT Cuts and Anti-Profiteering Measures Dampen the Effects of Food Price Inflation?
32241.zh_title: 增值税减免与反暴利措施能否抑制食品价格通胀的影响？
32241.authors: Youssef Benzarti, Santiago Garriga, Darío Tortarolo
32241.abstract: This paper estimates the effect of a temporary and large (21 p.p.) value-added tax (VAT) cut along with anti-profiteering measures on food necessities during a period of high inflation in Argentina. Using barcode-level data across more than 3,000 supermarkets, we find that (1) absent the anti-profiteering measures, the pass-through of the temporary VAT cut to prices was asymmetric: prices responded less to the VAT cut than its repeal resulting in prices that were higher than their pre-VAT cut levels; (2) imposing anti-profiteering measures, such as setting a ceiling on price increases, led to symmetric pass-through rates. Using a household welfare model, we show that the VAT cut resulted in progressive welfare effects and that the anti-profiteering measures were successful at dampening the regressive welfare effects of the asymmetric pass-through. However, we show that these policies benefited high-income households more because pass-through rates are more asymmetric in independent grocery stores, which is precisely where low-income households tend to shop the most.
32241.zh_abstract: 本文估计了阿根廷高通胀时期，对食品必需品实施的临时性、大规模增值税减免（21个百分点）以及反暴利措施的效果。利用超过3000家超市的条形码层面数据，我们发现：（1）在没有反暴利措施的情况下，临时性增值税减免向价格的传导是不对称的：价格对增值税减免的反应小于对其取消的反应，导致价格高于增值税减免前的水平；（2）实施反暴利措施（例如设定价格上涨上限）导致了对称的传导率。通过一个家庭福利模型，我们表明增值税减免产生了累进的福利效应，并且反暴利措施成功地抑制了不对称传导带来的累退福利效应。然而，我们表明这些政策使高收入家庭受益更多，因为在独立杂货店中传导率更加不对称，而这正是低收入家庭最常购物的地方。

32240.title: Within-Firm Pay Inequality and Productivity
32240.zh_title: 企业内部薪酬不平等与生产率
32240.authors: Melanie Wallskog, Nicholas Bloom, Scott W. Ohlmacher, Cristina Tello-Trillo
32240.abstract: Combining confidential Census worker and firm data, we find three key results. First, employees at more productive firms earn higher pay at all earnings levels. Second, this pay-productivity relationship strengthens with seniority, doubling from an elasticity of 0.07 for pay on productivity for the median-paid employee to 0.15 for the top-paid employee. Consequently, more productive firms have higher within-firm inequality. Our data suggests this is driven by their greater adoption of aggressive performance-pay bonus and management schemes. Finally, the magnitude of this pay-performance slope suggests rising productivity can explain 40% of the rise in within-firm inequality since 1980.
32240.zh_abstract: 结合保密的普查工人和企业数据，我们发现了三个关键结果。首先，生产率更高的企业为所有收入水平的员工支付更高的薪酬。其次，这种薪酬-生产率关系随着资历加深而增强，从中位数薪酬员工薪酬对生产率的弹性0.07翻倍至最高薪酬员工的0.15。因此，生产率更高的企业具有更高的内部不平等。我们的数据表明，这是由于它们更积极地采用激进的绩效薪酬奖金和管理方案。最后，这种薪酬-绩效斜率的大小表明，自1980年以来，生产率的提高可以解释企业内部不平等上升的40%。
