32239.title: Evaluating and Pricing Health Insurance in Lower-income Countries: A Field Experiment in India
32239.zh_title: 评估低收入国家健康保险并为其定价：印度的一项实地实验
32239.authors: Anup Malani, Cynthia Kinnan, Gabriella Conti, Kosuke Imai, Morgen Miller, Shailender Swaminathan, Alessandra Voena, Bartosz Woda
32239.abstract: Universal health coverage is a widely shared goal across lower-income countries. We conducted a large-scale, 4-year trial that randomized premiums and subsidies for India’s first national, public hospital insurance program, called RSBY. We find substantial demand (∼ 60% uptake) even when consumers were charged a price equal to the premium the government paid for insurance. We also find substantial adverse selection into insurance at positive prices. Insurance enrollment increases insurance utilization, partly due to spillovers from use of insurance by neighbors. However, healthcare utilization does not rise substantially, suggesting the primary benefit of insurance is financial. Many enrollees attempted to use insurance but failed, suggesting that learning is critical to the success of public insurance. We find very few statistically significant impacts of insurance access or enrollment on health. Because there is substantial willingness-to- pay for insurance, and given how distortionary it is to raise revenue in the Indian context, we calculate that our sample population should be charged a premium for RSBY between 67-95% of average costs (INR 528-1052, $\$30$-60) rather than a zero premium to maximize the marginal value of public funds.
32239.zh_abstract: 全民健康覆盖是低收入国家广泛认同的目标。我们进行了一项大规模、为期四年的试验，对印度首个全国性公立医院保险计划RSBY的保费和补贴进行了随机化。我们发现，即使消费者被收取与政府为保险支付的保费相等的价格，需求也相当可观（约60%的参保率）。我们还发现，在正价格下存在显著的逆向选择进入保险。保险参保增加了保险使用，部分原因是邻居使用保险的溢出效应。然而，医疗保健使用并未大幅增加，这表明保险的主要好处是财务上的。许多参保者尝试使用保险但失败了，这表明学习对于公共保险的成功至关重要。我们发现保险可及性或参保对健康的影响在统计上显著的结果很少。由于存在显著的保险支付意愿，并且考虑到在印度背景下筹集收入的扭曲性，我们计算出，为了最大化公共资金的边际价值，应向我们的样本人口收取RSBY保费，其金额为平均成本的67-95%（印度卢比528-1052，约30-60美元），而不是零保费。

32238.title: Sticky Discount Rates
32238.authors: Masao Fukui, Niels Joachim Gormsen, Kilian Huber
32238.abstract: We show that firms’ nominal required returns (i.e., discount rates) are sticky with respect to expected inflation. Sticky discount rates generate distinct theoretical predictions that are broadly consistent with stylized empirical patterns: increases in expected inflation directly raise real investment; demand shocks generate investment-consumption comovement; and the sensitivity of investment to interest rates is low. Sticky discount rates imply monetary non-neutrality, even when all other prices are flexible, because of a direct link from expected inflation to investment. In the New Keynesian optimal monetary policy problem, the central bank steers long-run inflation expectations, even in response to temporary shocks.
32238.zh_abstract: 我们证明，企业的名义必要回报率（即贴现率）相对于预期通胀具有粘性。粘性贴现率产生了独特的理论预测，这些预测与典型的经验模式大体一致：预期通胀上升直接提高了实际投资；需求冲击引发了投资与消费的联动；投资对利率的敏感度较低。即使所有其他价格都是灵活的，粘性贴现率也意味着货币非中性，这是因为预期通胀与投资之间存在直接联系。在新凯恩斯最优货币政策问题中，央行会引导长期通胀预期，即使是在应对暂时性冲击时也是如此。
32238.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, IFM, IO, ME, PR；JEL：D22, E22, E23, E31, E32, E43, E44, E52, E58, G12, G31

32237.title: Central Banking Post Crises
32237.abstract: The world economy has experienced the largest financial crisis in generations, a global pandemic, and a resurgence in inflation during the first quarter of the 21st century, yielding important insights for central banking. Price stability has important benefits and is the responsibility of a central bank. Achieving price stability in a complex and uncertain environment involves a credible commitment to a nominal anchor with a strong response to inflation and pre-emptive leaning against an overheating economy. Associated challenges imply that central bank communication and transparency are key elements of monetary policy strategies and tactics. Crises have emphasized the role of central banks in promoting financial stability, as financial stability is key to achieving price and economic stability, but this role increases risks to independence. Goals for central banks other than price and economic stability, complemented by financial stability, can make it more difficult for them to stabilize both inflation and economic activity.
32237.zh_abstract: 在21世纪的前二十五年里，世界经济经历了数代人以来最严重的金融危机、一场全球大流行病以及通胀的再度抬头，这为中央银行提供了重要启示。价格稳定具有重大益处，并且是央行的职责所在。在复杂且不确定的环境中实现价格稳定，需要可信地承诺一个名义锚，对通胀做出强有力的反应，并预防性地抑制经济过热。相关的挑战意味着，央行沟通和透明度是货币政策策略和战术的关键要素。危机凸显了央行在促进金融稳定方面的作用，因为金融稳定是实现价格和经济稳定的关键，但这一角色增加了独立性面临的风险。除了价格和经济稳定（辅以金融稳定）之外，为央行设定的其他目标，可能会使它们更难同时稳定通胀和经济活动。

32236.title: The Effect of Early Childhood Programs on Third-Grade Test Scores: Evidence from Transitional Kindergarten in Michigan
32236.zh_title: 早期儿童项目对三年级考试成绩的影响：来自密歇根州过渡性幼儿园的证据
32236.authors: Jordan S. Berne, Brian A. Jacob, Tareena Musaddiq, Anna Shapiro, Christina Weiland
32236.abstract: Transitional Kindergarten (TK) is a relatively recent entrant into the U.S. early education landscape, combining features of public pre-K and regular kindergarten. We provide the first estimates of the impact of Michigan’s TK program on 3rd grade test scores. Using an augmented regression discontinuity design, we find that TK improves 3rd grade math scores by 0.29 standard deviations relative to a counterfactual that includes other formal and informal learning options. This impact is notably large relative to the prior pre-K literature. Estimates for English Language Arts (ELA) are imprecise but suggestive of a positive effect as well.
32236.zh_abstract: 过渡性幼儿园（TK）是美国早期教育领域相对较新的参与者，它结合了公立学前班和常规幼儿园的特点。我们首次估算了密歇根州TK项目对三年级考试成绩的影响。使用增强的断点回归设计，我们发现，相对于包含其他正式和非正式学习选项的反事实情况，TK使三年级数学成绩提高了0.29个标准差。与之前的学前班文献相比，这一影响显著较大。对英语语言艺术（ELA）的估计不精确，但也暗示了正向效应。
32236.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS, PE；JEL：I20, I21, I24, I28, J01

32273.title: Ban-the-Box Laws: Fair and Effective?
32273.zh_title: “禁问犯罪记录”法律：公平且有效？
32273.abstract: Ban-the-box (BTB) laws are a widely used public policy rooted in employment law related to unnecessarily exclusionary hiring practices. BTB laws are intended to improve the employment opportunities of those with criminal backgrounds by giving them a fair chance during the hiring process. Prior research on the effectiveness of these laws in meeting their objective is limited and inconclusive. In this article, we extend the prior literature in two ways: we expand the years of analysis to a period of rapid expansion of BTB laws and we examine different types of BTB laws depending on the employers affected (e.g., public sector). Results indicate that BTB laws, any type of BTB law or BTB laws covering different types of employers, have no systematic or statistically significant association with employment of low-educated men, both young and old and across racial and ethnic groups. We speculate that the lack of effectiveness of BTB laws stems from the difficulty in enforcing such laws and already high rates of employer willingness to hire those with criminal histories.
32273.zh_abstract: “禁问犯罪记录”（BTB）法律是一项广泛使用的公共政策，源于与不必要排斥性招聘实践相关的就业法。BTB法律旨在通过给予有犯罪背景的人在招聘过程中公平的机会，来改善他们的就业机会。先前关于这些法律在实现其目标方面有效性的研究有限且尚无定论。在本文中，我们以两种方式扩展了先前文献：我们将分析年份扩展到BTB法律快速扩张的时期，并根据受影响的雇主类型（例如，公共部门）考察不同类型的BTB法律。结果表明，BTB法律（任何类型的BTB法律或覆盖不同类型雇主的BTB法律）与低教育水平男性（无论年轻还是年长，以及跨种族和族裔群体）的就业之间没有系统性或统计上显著的关联。我们推测，BTB法律缺乏有效性源于执行此类法律的困难以及雇主已经很高的愿意雇佣有犯罪历史者的比例。

32272.title: Apart but Connected: Online Tutoring, Cognitive Outcomes, and Soft Skills
32272.zh_title: 分离但相连：在线辅导、认知结果和软技能
32272.abstract: We study the Tutoring Online Program (TOP), where: (i) tutoring is entirely online; (ii) tutors are volunteer university students, matched with underprivileged middle school students. We leverage random assignment to estimate effects during and after the pandemic (2020 and 2022), investigating channels of impact. Three hours of individual tutoring per week increased math performance by 0.23 SD in 2020 and 0.20 SD in 2022. Higher-dosage yielded stronger effects, while group tutoring smaller effects. TOP enhanced students’ aspirations, socio-emotional skills and psychological well-being, but only during school closures. We also estimate the impact of TOP on tutors, finding increases in empathy.
32272.zh_abstract: 我们研究了在线辅导项目（TOP），其特点是：（i）辅导完全在线进行；（ii）辅导员是志愿的大学生，与弱势的初中生配对。我们利用随机分配来估计疫情期间及之后（2020年和2022年）的影响，并调查影响渠道。每周三小时的个别辅导使2020年数学成绩提高0.23个标准差，2022年提高0.20个标准差。更高剂量产生更强效果，而小组辅导效果较小。TOP增强了学生的抱负、社会情感技能和心理健康，但仅在学校关闭期间。我们还估计了TOP对辅导员的影响，发现共情能力有所提高。

32271.title: The Distributional Impact of Sectoral Supply and Demand Shifts: A Unified Framework
32271.zh_title: 部门供需变动的分配效应：一个统一框架
32271.authors: Nittai K. Bergman, Nir Jaimovich, Itay Saporta-Eksten
32271.abstract: Economies routinely experience a variety of sector-specific supply and demand shifts. Yet, the distributional welfare consequences of these shifts are not well understood. We address this gap by developing an analytical framework that jointly integrates supply-side and demand-side heterogeneity without imposing specific functional forms on consumption and production. This enables us to identify the key forces that shape the distributional welfare impact of sector-specific supply and demand shifts—in terms of consumer preferences and sectoral production functions. We estimate key parameters and quantify the heterogeneous welfare effects of sectoral shifts, revealing significant variation in their impact.
32271.zh_abstract: 经济体经常经历各种特定部门的供需变动。然而，这些变动的分配性福利后果尚不明确。我们通过开发一个分析框架来填补这一空白，该框架在不施加特定消费和生产函数形式的情况下，联合整合了供给侧和需求侧的异质性。这使我们能够识别出塑造特定部门供需变动分配性福利影响的关键力量——涉及消费者偏好和部门生产函数。我们估计了关键参数，并量化了部门变动的异质性福利效应，揭示了其影响的显著差异。

32270.title: Market Power in Artificial Intelligence
32270.zh_title: 人工智能中的市场势力
32270.abstract: This paper surveys the relevant existing literature that can help researchers and policy makers understand the drivers of competition in markets that constitute the provision of artificial intelligence products. The focus is on three broad markets: training data, input data, and AI predictions. It is shown that a key factor in determining the emergence and persistence of market power will be the operation of markets for data that would allow for trading data across firm boundaries.
32270.zh_abstract: 本文梳理了相关现有文献，旨在帮助研究人员和政策制定者理解构成人工智能产品供给的各个市场中竞争驱动因素。重点聚焦于三个广泛的市场：训练数据、输入数据和人工智能预测。研究表明，决定市场势力出现与持续的关键因素将是数据市场的运作方式，该市场允许数据在企业边界之外进行交易。

32269.title: Comprehensive OOS Evaluation of Predictive Algorithms with Statistical Decision Theory
32269.zh_title: 基于统计决策理论的预测算法全面样本外评估
32269.abstract: We argue that comprehensive out-of-sample (OOS) evaluation using statistical decision theory (SDT) should replace the current practice of K-fold and Common Task Framework validation in machine learning (ML) research. SDT provides a formal framework for performing comprehensive OOS evaluation across all possible (1) training samples, (2) populations that may generate training data, and (3) populations of prediction interest. Regarding feature (3), we emphasize that SDT requires the practitioner to directly confront the possibility that the future may not look like the past and to account for a possible need to extrapolate from one population to another when building a predictive algorithm. SDT is simple in abstraction, but it is often computationally demanding to implement. We discuss progress in tractable implementation of SDT when prediction accuracy is measured by mean square error or by misclassification rate. We summarize research studying settings in which the training data will be generated from a subpopulation of the population of prediction interest. We consider conditional prediction with alternative restrictions on the state space of possible populations that may generate training data. We present an illustrative application of the methodology to the problem of predicting patient illness to inform clinical decision making. We conclude by calling on ML researchers to join with econometricians and statisticians in expanding the domain within which implementation of SDT is tractable.
32269.zh_abstract: 我们认为，在机器学习研究中，应使用基于统计决策理论的全面样本外评估来取代当前流行的K折交叉验证和通用任务框架验证方法。统计决策理论提供了一个正式框架，能够对所有可能的（1）训练样本、（2）可能生成训练数据的总体以及（3）预测感兴趣的总体进行全面的样本外评估。关于特征（3），我们强调统计决策理论要求实践者直接面对未来可能与过去不同的可能性，并在构建预测算法时考虑从一个总体外推到另一个总体的潜在需求。统计决策理论在抽象层面很简单，但在实施时通常计算量很大。我们讨论了当预测精度通过均方误差或误分类率衡量时，在统计决策理论的可处理实施方面取得的进展。我们总结了针对训练数据将来自预测感兴趣总体的子总体这一情景的研究。我们考虑了在可能生成训练数据的总体状态空间上施加不同限制的条件预测。我们通过一个将方法应用于预测患者病情以辅助临床决策的示例来说明该方法。最后，我们呼吁机器学习研究人员与计量经济学家和统计学家合作，共同扩展统计决策理论可处理实施的领域。

32268.title: Aggregation, Liquidity, and Asset Prices with Incomplete Markets
32268.zh_title: 不完全市场下的加总、流动性与资产价格
32268.authors: Sebastian Di Tella, Benjamin M. Hébert, Pablo Kurlat
32268.abstract: We analytically characterize asset-pricing and consumption behavior in two-account heterogeneous-agent models with aggregate risk. We show that trading frictions can simultaneously explain (1) household-level consumption behavior such as high marginal propensities to consume, (2) a zero-beta rate on equities that satisfies an aggregate consumption Euler equation, (3) a return on safe assets that does not, and (4) a flat securities market line. The return of equities is well explained by aggregate consumption, while the return of safe assets reflects a large and volatile liquidity premium.
32268.zh_abstract: 我们在具有总体风险的双账户异质性代理人模型中，对资产定价和消费行为进行了分析性刻画。我们证明，交易摩擦可以同时解释：（1）家庭层面的消费行为，如高边际消费倾向；（2）满足总体消费欧拉方程的股票零贝塔收益率；（3）不满足该方程的安全资产收益率；以及（4）平坦的证券市场线。股票的收益率可以由总体消费很好地解释，而安全资产的收益率则反映了一个巨大且波动的流动性溢价。

32267.title: Does Consolidation in Medicare Part D affect Enrollment and Drug Expenditures?
32267.zh_title: Medicare D部分合并是否影响参保和药品支出？
32267.authors: Pinka Chatterji, Chun-Yu Ho, Tao Jin, Yichuan Wang
32267.abstract: This paper exploits the nationwide merger of CVS and Universal American to examine how industry consolidation in Medicare Part D affects beneficiaries’ enrollment in stand-alone prescription drug plans (PDPs) and out-of-pocket (OOP) drug spending. Data come from the 2010-2016 waves of the Health and Retirement Study (HRS). We find that overall, the merger decreases enrollment in stand-alone PDPs and increases OOP drug spending among enrollees who remain in PDPs. The merger’s negative effects on PDP enrollment are driven by healthier beneficiaries, while the increases in OOP drug spending are stronger for lower-income individuals and for individuals in worse health. The merger also leads to effects beyond drug usage and the PDP market; in particular, PDP enrollees use fewer outpatient visits and, overall, Medicare beneficiaries are less likely to enroll in Medicare Advantage prescription drug (MAPD) plans after the merger. Finally, we find some evidence that higher plan premiums and changes in plans’ quality and drug access after the merger are potential mechanisms leading to our main results.
32267.zh_abstract: 本文利用CVS与Universal American的全国性合并，考察了Medicare D部分行业整合如何影响受益人对独立处方药计划的参保以及自付药品支出。数据来自2010-2016年健康与退休研究。我们发现，总体而言，该合并降低了独立处方药计划的参保率，并增加了仍留在处方药计划中的参保人的自付药品支出。合并对处方药计划参保的负面影响主要由健康状况较好的受益人驱动，而自付药品支出的增加在低收入人群和健康状况较差的人群中更为显著。该合并还产生了超出药品使用和处方药计划市场的影响；特别是，处方药计划参保人在合并后减少了门诊就诊次数，并且总体而言，Medicare受益人在合并后加入Medicare Advantage处方药计划的可能性降低。最后，我们发现有证据表明，合并后更高的计划保费以及计划质量和药品获取渠道的变化是导致我们主要结果的潜在机制。

32266.title: Forced Migration and Refugees: Policies for Successful Economic and Social Integration
32266.zh_title: 被迫移民与难民：实现成功经济与社会融合的政策
32266.authors: Dany Bahar, Rebecca J. Brough, Giovanni Peri
32266.abstract: The inflow of refugees and their subsequent integration can be an important challenge for both the refugees themselves and the host society. Policy interventions can improve the lives and economic success of refugees and of their communities. In this paper, we review the socioeconomic integration policy interventions focused on refugees and the evidence surrounding them. We also highlight some interesting topics for future research and stress the need to rigorously evaluate their effectiveness and implications for the successful integration of refugees.
32266.zh_abstract: 难民的流入及其随后的融合对难民本身和接收社会都可能构成重大挑战。政策干预可以改善难民及其社区的生活和经济成就。在本文中，我们回顾了针对难民的社会经济融合政策干预及其相关证据。我们还强调了未来研究的一些有趣主题，并强调需要严格评估这些干预措施的有效性及其对难民成功融合的影响。

32265.title: The Long-Run Impacts of Public Industrial Investment on Local Development and Economic Mobility: Evidence from World War II
32265.zh_title: 公共工业投资对地方发展与经济流动性的长期影响：来自第二次世界大战的证据
32265.abstract: This paper studies the long-run effects of government-led construction of manufacturing plants on the regions where they were built and on individuals from those regions. Specifically, we examine publicly financed plants built in dispersed locations outside of major urban centers for security reasons during the United States' industrial mobilization for World War II. Wartime plant construction had large and persistent impacts on local development, characterized by an expansion of relatively high-wage manufacturing employment throughout the postwar era. These benefits were shared by incumbent residents; we find men born before WWII in counties where plants were built earned $\$1,200$ (in 2020 dollars) or 2.5 percent more per year in adulthood relative to those born in counterfactual comparison regions, with larger benefits accruing to children of lower-income parents. The balance of evidence suggests that these individuals benefited primarily from the local expansion of higher-wage jobs to which they had access as adults, rather than because of developmental effects from exposure to better environments during childhood.
32265.zh_abstract: 本文研究了政府主导的制造工厂建设对其所在地区以及来自这些地区的个人的长期影响。具体而言，我们考察了美国为第二次世界大战进行工业动员期间，出于安全原因在主要城市中心以外的分散地点建设的公共资助工厂。战时工厂建设对地方发展产生了巨大且持续的影响，其特点是战后时期相对高工资的制造业就业岗位扩张。这些好处惠及了现有居民；我们发现，二战前出生在建有工厂的县的男性，成年后每年比出生在反事实对照地区的男性多赚1200美元（按2020年美元计算）或2.5%，且低收入父母的孩子获得了更大的收益。证据总体表明，这些个人主要受益于他们成年后能够获得的本地高工资工作岗位的扩张，而非由于童年时期接触更好环境所带来的发展效应。
32265.meta: Programs：DAE, LS, PE；JEL：H56, J31, J62, N42, R11, R53

32264.title: Attribute-based Subsidies and Market Power: an Application to Electric Vehicles
32264.zh_title: 基于属性的补贴与市场势力：以电动汽车为例
32264.authors: Panle Jia Barwick, Hyuk-Soo Kwon, Shanjun Li
32264.abstract: Attribute-based subsidies (ABS) are commonly used to promote the diffusion of energy-efficient products, whose manufacturers often wield significant market power. We develop a theoretical framework for the optimal design of ABS to account for endogenous product attributes, environmental externalities, and market power. We then estimate an equilibrium model of China's vehicle market under ABS and conduct counterfactual simulations to evaluate the welfare impacts of various subsidy designs. Compared to the uniform subsidies, ABS lead to higher product quality and are more effective in mitigating quantity distortions, albeit with a modest environmental cost. Between 42% to 62% of welfare gains under ABS relative to uniform subsidies are attributed to more desirable product attributes, with the remainder explained by reductions in market power distortions. Allowing subsidy redistribution through product-level subsidies, as suggested by our theoretical model, further enhances welfare gains by an additional 34% to 62%. Among the ABS designs, China's notched subsidy design based on driving range leads to vehicle downsizing that undermines welfare benefits. Subsidies based on battery capacity, as implemented in the U.S., achieve the highest welfare gains by effectively balancing market power and environmental impacts.
32264.zh_abstract: 基于属性的补贴常用于推广能效产品，而这些产品的制造商通常拥有显著的市场势力。我们构建了一个理论框架，用于在考虑内生产品属性、环境外部性和市场势力的情况下，优化设计基于属性的补贴。然后，我们估计了一个基于属性补贴下中国汽车市场的均衡模型，并进行反事实模拟，以评估各种补贴设计的福利影响。与统一补贴相比，基于属性的补贴带来了更高的产品质量，并且在缓解数量扭曲方面更有效，尽管伴随着适度的环境成本。在基于属性补贴相对于统一补贴的福利收益中，42%至62%归因于更理想的产品属性，其余部分则归因于市场势力扭曲的减少。如我们的理论模型所示，允许通过产品级补贴进行补贴再分配，可进一步将福利收益提高34%至62%。在基于属性的补贴设计中，中国基于续航里程的分级补贴设计导致了车辆小型化，从而削弱了福利收益。而美国实施的基于电池容量的补贴，通过有效平衡市场势力与环境影响，实现了最高的福利收益。

32263.title: Shortening the Path to Productive Investment: Evidence from Input Fairs and Cash Transfers in Malawi
32263.zh_title: 缩短生产性投资之路：来自马拉维投入品集市和现金转移的证据
32263.authors: Shilpa Aggarwal, Dahyeon Jeong, Naresh Kumar, David Sungho Park, Jonathan Robinson, Alan Spearot
32263.abstract: While cash transfers consistently show large effects on immediate outcomes like consumption, limited access to markets may mute their impact on productive investment. In an experiment in Malawi, we cross-cut cash transfers with an "input fair," designed to reduce transport costs to access agricultural inputs. Cash alone increases investment by 27%, while the joint provision of cash and the input fair increases investment by about 40%; thus, the incremental effect of the input fair is equivalent to about a 50% increase compared to the effect of cash alone. Input fairs alone were ineffective.
32263.zh_abstract: 尽管现金转移在消费等即时结果上持续显示出巨大效果，但有限的市场准入可能会削弱其对生产性投资的影响。在马拉维的一项实验中，我们将现金转移与旨在降低获取农业投入品运输成本的“投入品集市”进行交叉设计。仅现金转移使投资增加了27%，而同时提供现金和投入品集市则使投资增加了约40%；因此，投入品集市的增量效应相当于仅现金转移效应的约50%。仅提供投入品集市则无效。

32262.title: Measuring the Commercial Potential of Science
32262.authors: Roger Masclans, Sharique Hasan, Wesley M. Cohen
32262.abstract: We develop an ex-ante measure of commercial potential of science, an otherwise unobservable variable driving the performance of innovation-intensive firms. To do so, we rely on LLMs and neural networks to predict whether scientific articles will influence firms’ use of science. Incorporating time-varying models and the quantification of uncertainty, the measure is validated through both traditional methods and out-of-sample exercises, leveraging a major university’s technology transfer data. To illustrate the methodological contributions of our measure, we apply it to examining the impacts of university reputation and university privatization of science, finding that firms’ reliance on reputation may lead to foregone opportunities, and privatization (i.e., patenting) appears to increase firms’ use of the science of one university. We make our measure and method available to researchers.
32262.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一种事前衡量科学商业潜力的方法，这是一个驱动创新密集型公司绩效但原本不可观测的变量。为此，我们依赖大语言模型和神经网络来预测科学文章是否会影响企业对科学的使用。该衡量方法结合了时变模型和不确定性量化，并通过传统方法和样本外练习进行了验证，利用了某所主要大学的技术转移数据。为了说明我们衡量方法的方法论贡献，我们将其应用于考察大学声誉和大学科学私有化的影响，发现企业对声誉的依赖可能导致错失机会，而私有化（即专利化）似乎增加了企业对某所大学科学的使用。我们向研究人员提供我们的衡量方法和工具。
32262.meta: Programs：PR；JEL：O3, O30, O31, O32, O33, O34, O35, O36, O38, O39

32261.title: 3D-PCA: Factor Models with Restrictions
32261.abstract: This paper proposes latent factor models for multidimensional panels called 3D-PCA. Factor weights are constructed from a small set of dimension-specific building blocks, which give rise to proportionality restrictions of factor weights. While the set of feasible factors is restricted, factors with long/short structures often found in pricing factors are admissible. I estimate the model using a 3-dimensional data set of double-sorted portfolios of 11 characteristics. Factors estimated by 3D-PCA have higher Sharpe ratios and smaller cross-sectional pricing errors than models with PCA or Fama-French factors. Since factor weights are subject to restrictions, the number of free parameters is small. Consequently, the model produces robust results in short time series and performs well in recursive out-of-sample estimations.
32261.zh_abstract: 本文提出了针对多维面板数据的潜在因子模型，称为3D-PCA。因子权重由一小组特定维度的构建块构成，这导致了因子权重的比例约束。虽然可行因子的集合受到限制，但定价因子中常见的多空结构因子是可接受的。我使用一个包含11个特征的双重排序投资组合的三维数据集来估计模型。与使用PCA或Fama-French因子的模型相比，通过3D-PCA估计的因子具有更高的夏普比率和更小的横截面定价误差。由于因子权重受到约束，自由参数的数量很少。因此，该模型在短时间序列中产生稳健的结果，并在递归样本外估计中表现良好。

32260.title: Navigating Higher Education Insurance: An Experimental Study on Demand and Adverse Selection
32260.zh_title: 导航高等教育保险：关于需求与逆向选择的实验研究
32260.authors: Sidhya Balakrishnan, Eric Bettinger, Michael S. Kofoed, Dubravka Ritter, Douglas A. Webber, Ege Aksu, Jonathan S. Hartley
32260.abstract: We conduct a survey-based experiment with 2,776 students at a non-profit university to analyze income insurance demand in education financing. We offered students a hypothetical choice: either a federal loan with income-driven repayment or an income-share agreement (ISA), with randomized framing of downside protections. Emphasizing income insurance increased ISA uptake by 43%. We observe that students are responsive to changes in contract terms and possible student loan cancellation, which is evidence of preference adjustment or adverse selection. Our results indicate that framing specific terms can increase demand for higher education insurance to potentially address risk for students with varying outcomes.
32260.zh_abstract: 我们在一所非营利大学对2776名学生进行了一项基于调查的实验，以分析教育融资中的收入保险需求。我们向学生提供了一种假设选择：要么是带有收入驱动还款的联邦贷款，要么是收入分享协议，并对下行保护进行了随机框架设计。强调收入保险使收入分享协议的采纳率提高了43%。我们观察到学生对合同条款的变化以及可能的学生贷款取消有反应，这是偏好调整或逆向选择的证据。我们的结果表明，对特定条款进行框架设计可以增加对高等教育保险的需求，从而可能应对结果各异的学生所面临的风险。

32259.title: Effects of COVID-19 Shutdowns on Domestic Violence in the U.S.
32259.zh_title: 新冠疫情封锁对美国家庭暴力的影响
32259.authors: Yutong Chen, Amalia R. Miller, Carmit Segal, Melissa K. Spencer
32259.abstract: This chapter examines the impact of COVID-19 shutdowns on domestic violence (DV) in the United States. Despite widespread concerns that pandemic shutdowns could increase DV, initial studies found mixed evidence that varied across data sources and locations. We review the evolving literature on the effects of the pandemic and highlight results from studies that examine multiple measures of DV across a common set of large cities. These studies show that the conflicting early results are due to opposite effects of pandemic shutdowns on two measures of DV in police data: an increase in domestic violence 911 calls and a decrease in DV crime reports. In theory, this divergence can come from either higher DV reporting rates, possibly because of additional media attention to DV and greater third-party calling, or from lower policing intensity for DV crimes. Prior evidence from police data and other sources supports the conclusion that the increase in calls came from greater reporting, while the incidence of criminal DV decreased. Finally, we present new evidence drawing on police and hospitals records from across the state of California to show that DV crimes and hospital emergency department (ED) visits were both lower during pandemic shutdowns.
32259.zh_abstract: 本章考察了新冠疫情封锁对美国家庭暴力的影响。尽管普遍担心疫情封锁可能增加家庭暴力，但初步研究发现证据不一，且因数据来源和地点而异。我们回顾了关于疫情影响的不断发展的文献，并重点介绍了在一组共同的大城市中考察多种家庭暴力衡量指标的研究结果。这些研究表明，早期相互矛盾的结果源于疫情封锁对警方数据中两种家庭暴力衡量指标产生了相反的影响：家庭暴力911报警电话增加，而家庭暴力犯罪报告减少。理论上，这种分歧可能源于更高的家庭暴力报告率（可能是因为媒体对家庭暴力的额外关注和更多的第三方报警），或者源于警方对家庭暴力犯罪的执法力度降低。先前来自警方数据和其他来源的证据支持了这样的结论：报警电话的增加源于更高的报告率，而犯罪性家庭暴力的发生率则下降了。最后，我们利用加州全州的警方和医院记录提供了新证据，表明在疫情封锁期间，家庭暴力犯罪和医院急诊科就诊量均有所下降。
32259.meta: Programs：EH, LE, LS, PE；JEL：I18, J12, J16, K42

32294.title: The Missing Link? Using LinkedIn Data to Measure Race, Ethnic, and Gender Differences in Employment Outcomes at Individual Companies
32294.zh_title: 缺失的环节？利用领英数据衡量个别公司在种族、民族和性别方面的就业结果差异
32294.authors: Alexander Berry, Elizabeth M. Maloney, David Neumark
32294.abstract: Stronger enforcement of discrimination laws can help to reduce disparities in economic outcomes with respect to race, ethnicity, and gender in the United States. However, the data necessary to detect possible discrimination and to act to counter it is not publicly available – in particular, data on racial, ethnic, and gender disparities within specific companies. In this paper, we explore and develop methods to use information extracted from publicly available LinkedIn data to measure the racial, ethnic, and gender composition of company workforces. We use predictive tools based on both names and pictures to identify race, ethnicity, and gender. We show that one can use LinkedIn data to obtain reasonably reliable measures of workforce demographic composition by race, ethnicity, and gender, based on validation exercises comparing estimates from scraped LinkedIn data to two sources: ACS data, and company diversity or EEO-1 reports. We apply our methods to study the race, ethnic, and gender composition of workers who were hired and those who experienced mass layoffs at two large companies. Finally, we explore using LinkedIn data to measure race, ethnic, and gender differences in promotion. In our analyses of layoffs and promotions, we find suggestive evidence of discrimination at some of the companies we study, including evidence of “intersectional” discrimination against black and Hispanic women.
32294.zh_abstract: 加强反歧视法律的执行有助于减少美国在种族、民族和性别方面经济结果的差异。然而，检测可能存在的歧视并采取行动所需的数据——特别是特定公司内部种族、民族和性别差异的数据——并未公开。在本文中，我们探索并开发了利用从公开可用的领英数据中提取信息来衡量公司劳动力种族、民族和性别构成的方法。我们使用基于姓名和照片的预测工具来识别种族、民族和性别。我们通过验证练习，将抓取的领英数据估算结果与两个来源（美国社区调查数据和公司多样性或EEO-1报告）进行比较，表明可以利用领英数据获得关于劳动力人口统计构成（按种族、民族和性别划分）的相当可靠的衡量指标。我们应用这些方法研究了两家大型公司中被雇佣员工以及经历大规模裁员员工的种族、民族和性别构成。最后，我们探索了利用领英数据衡量晋升中的种族、民族和性别差异。在对裁员和晋升的分析中，我们发现了所研究的一些公司存在歧视的暗示性证据，包括针对黑人和西班牙裔女性的“交叉性”歧视证据。

32293.title: Book Value Risk Management of Banks: Limited Hedging, HTM Accounting, and Rising Interest Rates
32293.zh_title: 银行账面价值风险管理：有限对冲、持有至到期会计与利率上升
32293.authors: João Granja, Erica Xuewei Jiang, Gregor Matvos, Tomasz Piskorski, Amit Seru
32293.abstract: We document that as interest rates rose in 2022, banks limited the impact on the accounting value of their assets but left most long-duration assets exposed to interest rate risk. Call report and SEC data show that only about 6% of U.S. banking assets were hedged with derivatives, and even the heaviest users hedged only a small share of their portfolios. Rather than hedge market-value risk, banks relied on held-to-maturity (HTM) accounting to shield book capital, reclassifying roughly $\$1$ trillion of securities as HTM once rates began to rise. More vulnerable banks, especially those overseen by less stringent state regulators, were more likely to shift into HTM. We develop a simple model of how capital regulation, accounting rules, and bank incentives interact in determining whether banks hedge interest rate risk or recapitalize. Capital regulation can reduce run risk, particularly when equity holders are unwilling to hedge or raise new capital. HTM accounting can help well-capitalized banks avoid the costs of excessively tight capital requirements, but it can also enable weaker, moderately-capitalized, banks to window-dress capital ratios, leaving them susceptible to runs. Incorporating deposit franchise value into regulatory capital without considering run risk may further weaken the effectiveness of capital regulation. These findings carry important implications for regulatory capital accounting and risk-management practices across the banking sector.
32293.zh_abstract: 我们记录了在2022年利率上升时，银行限制了对其资产会计价值的影响，但使大多数长期资产暴露于利率风险之下。呼叫报告和证券交易委员会数据显示，只有约6%的美国银行资产通过衍生品进行了对冲，即使是最重度使用者也只对冲了其投资组合的一小部分。银行没有对冲市场价值风险，而是依赖持有至到期会计来保护账面资本，在利率开始上升后将大约1万亿美元的证券重新分类为持有至到期。更脆弱的银行，尤其是那些由监管较宽松的州级机构监管的银行，更有可能转向持有至到期。我们建立了一个简单模型，说明资本监管、会计规则和银行激励如何相互作用，决定银行是对冲利率风险还是进行资本重组。资本监管可以降低挤兑风险，尤其是在股东不愿对冲或筹集新资本时。持有至到期会计可以帮助资本充足的银行避免过于严格的资本要求带来的成本，但它也可能使较弱、资本适中的银行粉饰资本比率，使其容易遭受挤兑。在不考虑挤兑风险的情况下将存款特许经营权价值纳入监管资本，可能进一步削弱资本监管的有效性。这些发现对银行业监管资本会计和风险管理实践具有重要启示。

32292.title: The Influence of Occupational Licensing on Workforce Transitions to Retirement
32292.zh_title: 职业许可对劳动力向退休过渡的影响
32292.authors: Yun taek Oh, Morris M. Kleiner
32292.abstract: Ways of leaving the labor force has been an understudied aspect of labor market outcomes. Labor market institutions such as occupational licensing may influence how individuals transition to retirement. When and how workers transition from career jobs to full retirement may contribute to pre- and post-retirement well-being. Previous investigations of retirement pathways focused on the patterns and outcomes of retirement transitions, yet the influence of occupational licensing on retirement transition has not been analyzed. In this study, we use the Current Population Survey and Survey of Income and Program Participation to investigate how occupational licensing influences American later-career workers’ choice of retirement pathways. Our results show that licensed workers are less likely to choose to change careers but more likely to reduce work hours in transitioning out of the workforce. These results are consistent with the findings that licensed workers receive more benefits in the form of preferable retirement options, suggesting that these workers tend to have higher wages, benefits, and flexibility even toward the end of their careers.
32292.zh_abstract: 离开劳动力市场的方式一直是劳动力市场结果中研究不足的一个方面。职业许可等劳动力市场制度可能影响个人向退休过渡的方式。工人从职业生涯工作过渡到完全退休的时间和方式可能影响退休前后的福祉。以往对退休路径的研究侧重于退休过渡的模式和结果，但尚未分析职业许可对退休过渡的影响。在本研究中，我们使用当前人口调查和收入与项目参与调查来调查职业许可如何影响美国晚期职业工人对退休路径的选择。我们的结果表明，持有执照的工人在退出劳动力市场时，不太可能选择转行，但更可能减少工作时间。这些结果与持有执照的工人以更优退休选择形式获得更多福利的发现一致，表明这些工人即使在职业生涯末期也倾向于拥有更高的工资、福利和灵活性。
32292.meta: Programs：LS；JEL：J0, J26, J3, J30, J32, J33, J40, J44

32291.title: Aggregate Demand Externality and Self-Fulfilling Default Cycles
32291.zh_title: 总需求外部性与自我实现的违约周期
32291.authors: Jess Benhabib, Feng Dong, Pengfei Wang, Zhenyang Xu
32291.abstract: We develop a model of self-fulfilling default cycles with demand externality a la Dixit- Stiglitz to explain the recurrent clustered defaults observed in the data. The literature reports that observable fundamental factors alone are insufficient to explain the cluster. A decline in aggregate output reduces the value of firms and increases their probability of default. As defaults take more firms out of production, aggregate output declines further, creating a positive feedback loop that generates multiple equilibria and self-fulfilling default cycles. Our global analysis using Bogdanov-Takens bifurcation reveals the existence of multiple or even infinite paths that satisfy all equilibrium conditions. Moreover, a family of periodic orbits can emerge in the perfect foresight equilibrium. Our model is consistent with the view that business cycles arise largely because the economy’s internal forces tend to endogenously generate cyclical mechanisms (Beaudry et al., 2020).
32291.zh_abstract: 我们建立了一个具有迪克西特-斯蒂格利茨式需求外部性的自我实现违约周期模型，以解释数据中观察到的反复出现的集群违约现象。文献报告称，仅凭可观测的基本面因素不足以解释这种集群现象。总产出的下降会降低企业价值并增加其违约概率。随着违约使更多企业退出生产，总产出进一步下降，形成正反馈循环，产生多重均衡和自我实现的违约周期。我们使用博格丹诺夫-塔肯斯分岔进行的全局分析揭示了存在多条甚至无限条满足所有均衡条件的路径。此外，在完美预见均衡中可能出现一族周期轨道。我们的模型与以下观点一致：经济周期很大程度上源于经济内部力量倾向于内生地产生周期性机制。

32290.title: Contracts with Interdependent Preferences
32290.zh_title: 具有相互依赖偏好的契约
32290.abstract: A principal contracts with multiple agents, as in Lazear and Rosen (1981) and Green and Stokey (1983). The setup is classical except for the assumption that agents have interdependent preferences. We characterize cost effective contracts, and relate the direction of co-movement in rewards — “joint liability” (positive) or “tournaments” (negative) — to the assumed structure of preference interdependence. We also study the implications of preference interdependence for the principal’s payoffs. We identify two asymmetries. First, the optimal contract leans towards joint liability rather than tournaments, especially in larger teams, in a sense made precise in the paper. Second, when the mechanism-design problem is augmented by robustness constraints designed to eliminate multiple equilibria, the principal may prefer teams linked via adversarial rather than altruistic preferences.
32290.zh_abstract: 一个委托人与多个代理人签订契约，如拉齐尔和罗森（1981）以及格林和斯托基（1983）所述。除了假设代理人具有相互依赖的偏好外，该设定是经典的。我们刻画了成本有效的契约，并将报酬共同变动方向——“连带责任”（正向）或“锦标赛”（负向）——与假定的偏好相互依赖结构联系起来。我们还研究了偏好相互依赖对委托人收益的影响。我们识别出两种不对称性。首先，最优契约倾向于连带责任而非锦标赛，尤其是在较大的团队中，其含义在文中精确阐述。其次，当机制设计问题通过旨在消除多重均衡的稳健性约束得到增强时，委托人可能偏好通过对抗性而非利他性偏好联系起来的团队。

32289.title: Enforcement Risk and Screening in Rental Markets: Evidence from Eviction Moratoria
32289.zh_title: 租赁市场中的执行风险与筛选：来自驱逐暂停令的证据
32289.authors: Alina Arefeva, Kay Jowers, Qihui Hu, Christopher Timmins
32289.abstract: We combine a hand-collected dataset on state eviction moratoria with a nationwide field experiment of more than 25,000 rental inquiries to study how contract enforcement affects screening in rental housing markets. Using staggered moratorium expirations, we show that property managers discriminated more against minority renters when eviction enforcement was suspended. Linking inquiries to tenant address histories, we find that non-responses translated into different move-in patterns and reduced property owners’ returns through foregone leasing opportunities. A simple search model rationalizes these responses as property managers re-optimize when enforcement is suspended.
32289.zh_abstract: 我们将手工收集的州级驱逐暂停令数据与一项涵盖超过25,000次租赁咨询的全国性实地实验相结合，研究合同执行如何影响租赁住房市场中的筛选。利用暂停令到期的时间差异，我们表明当驱逐执行暂停时，物业经理对少数族裔租户的歧视加剧。通过将咨询与租户地址历史记录关联，我们发现未回复转化为不同的迁入模式，并通过放弃的租赁机会降低了业主的回报。一个简单的搜索模型将这些反应合理化，即物业经理在执行暂停时重新优化其行为。
32289.meta: Programs：PE；JEL：D83, G18, G21, G32, J15, R31

32288.title: How Does Expropriation Risk Affect Innovation?
32288.zh_title: 征收风险如何影响创新？
32288.authors: Jose-Miguel Benavente, Claudio Bravo-Ortega, Pablo Egaña-delSol, Bronwyn H. Hall
32288.abstract: We analyze how expropriation risk reduces incentives for innovation and reallocates resources from the innovative sector, building on Romer’s(1990) model. Our framework predicts the R&D expenditure, the share of human capital in R&D, the number of patents, technical progress, and economic growth are all lower due to lower expected profits and patent devaluation in the presence of expropriation risks. Empirical analyses, based on a LASSO Instrumental Variable approach and a novel comprehensive dataset spanning nearly two decades, confirm our theoretical predictions. We find robust evidence that expropriation risk, such as corruption, negatively impacts innovation by reducing R&D expenditure, human capital in R&D, number of patents, scientific publications, and the Economic Complexity Index, which is our proxy for technical progress. These findings highlight the detrimental effects of expropriation risk on innovation and economic development at the country level.
32288.zh_abstract: 我们基于罗默（1990）的模型，分析了征收风险如何降低创新激励并将资源从创新部门重新配置。我们的框架预测，由于存在征收风险，预期利润降低和专利贬值，导致研发支出、研发中的人力资本份额、专利数量、技术进步和经济增长均较低。基于LASSO工具变量方法和一个涵盖近二十年的新颖综合数据集的实证分析，证实了我们的理论预测。我们发现了稳健的证据，表明征收风险（如腐败）通过减少研发支出、研发中的人力资本、专利数量、科学出版物以及作为技术进步代理变量的经济复杂性指数，对创新产生负面影响。这些发现突显了征收风险在国家层面对创新和经济发展的不利影响。

32287.title: Blended Finance
32287.authors: Caroline Flammer, Thomas Giroux, Geoffrey Heal
32287.abstract: Blended finance—the use of public and philanthropic funding to crowd in private capital—has emerged as a potential tool for financing sustainable development. Yet little is known about the design of blended finance contracts. We develop a conceptual framework in which development finance institutions (DFIs) allocate concessional capital across projects to maximize societal impact while crowding in private investors. Our framework highlights a trade-off between sustainability impact and the amount of concessionality required to make projects commercially viable and characterizes how DFIs optimally combine different instruments, including concessional debt, junior equity tranches, and risk management facilities. We then provide empirical evidence on blended finance using deal-level data from a major DFI. Consistent with our conceptual framework, projects with higher anticipated sustainability impact receive greater concessionality. Moreover, concessionality is higher in countries with greater political risk and information asymmetries, and these projects are more likely to include risk management provisions. Our findings provide new evidence on how DFIs deploy catalytic capital to mobilize private investment in sustainable development.
32287.zh_abstract: 混合融资——利用公共和慈善资金撬动私人资本——已成为为可持续发展融资的潜在工具。然而，人们对混合融资契约的设计知之甚少。我们开发了一个概念框架，其中开发金融机构在项目间分配优惠资本，以最大化社会影响，同时撬动私人投资者。我们的框架强调了可持续性影响与使项目具有商业可行性所需的优惠程度之间的权衡，并刻画了开发金融机构如何最优地组合不同工具，包括优惠债务、次级股权层级和风险管理设施。然后，我们利用一家主要开发金融机构的交易层面数据，提供了关于混合融资的实证证据。与我们的概念框架一致，预期可持续性影响更高的项目获得了更大的优惠性。此外，在政治风险和不对称信息较高的国家，优惠性更高，并且这些项目更可能包含风险管理条款。我们的发现为开发金融机构如何部署催化资本以动员私人投资于可持续发展提供了新证据。
32287.meta: Programs：AP, CF, DEV, EEE, PE；JEL：G23, H41, O1, Q01, Q14

32286.title: Promoting Public Health with Blunt Instruments: Evidence from Vaccine Mandates
32286.zh_title: 用钝器促进公共卫生：来自疫苗强制令的证据
32286.authors: Rahi Abouk, John S. Earle, Johanna Catherine Maclean, Sungbin Park
32286.abstract: We study the effect of mandates requiring COVID-19 vaccination among healthcare industry workers adopted in 2021 in the United States. There are long-standing worker shortages in the U.S. healthcare industry, pre-dating the COVID-19 pandemic. The impact of COVID-19 vaccine mandates on shortages is ex ante ambiguous. If mandates increase perceived safety of the healthcare industry, marginal workers may be drawn to healthcare, relaxing shortages. On the other hand, if marginal workers are vaccine hesitant or averse, then mandates may push workers away from the industry and exacerbate shortages. We combine monthly data from the Current Population Survey 2021 to 2022 with difference-in-differences methods to study the effects of state vaccine mandates on the probability of working in healthcare, and of employment transitions into and out of the industry. Our findings suggest that vaccine mandates may have worsened healthcare workforce shortages: following adoption of a state-level mandate, the probability of working in the healthcare industry declines by 6%. Effects are larger among workers in healthcare-specific occupations, who leave the industry at higher rates in response to mandates and are slower to be replaced than workers in non-healthcare occupations. Findings suggest trade-offs faced by health policymakers seeking to achieve multiple health objectives.
32286.zh_abstract: 我们研究了2021年美国通过的针对医疗行业从业者的新冠疫苗强制令的效果。美国医疗行业长期存在劳动力短缺问题，这早在新冠疫情之前就已存在。新冠疫苗强制令对劳动力短缺的影响在事前是不确定的。如果强制令提高了医疗行业的感知安全性，边际劳动者可能会被吸引到医疗行业，从而缓解短缺。另一方面，如果边际劳动者对疫苗犹豫或反感，那么强制令可能会将劳动者推离该行业，加剧短缺。我们将2021年至2022年当前人口调查的月度数据与双重差分方法相结合，研究州级疫苗强制令对在医疗行业工作概率以及进入和离开该行业的就业转换的影响。我们的研究结果表明，疫苗强制令可能加剧了医疗劳动力短缺：在州级强制令实施后，在医疗行业工作的概率下降了6%。这种效应在医疗特定职业的工人中更大，他们因强制令而离开该行业的比率更高，并且比非医疗职业的工人更慢被替代。研究结果揭示了寻求实现多重健康目标的卫生政策制定者所面临的权衡取舍。
32286.meta: Programs：EH, LS, PE；JEL：H70, I1, I11, J20

32285.title: Explorations of Cumulative Advantage Using Data on French Physicists
32285.zh_title: 利用法国物理学家数据探索累积优势
32285.abstract: We use a large dataset of approximately 1500 physicists employed by the Centre National de la Recherche Scientifique (CNRS) in France to investigate the role of cumulative advantage in their publication career. Measuring output by time series of the number of publications and the number of cite-weighted publications for each physicist, we find that the simple stylized facts predicted by cumulative advantage hold only weakly for these physicists. However, regressions with fixed effects, life cycle effects, and past productivity provide strong evidence that cumulative advantage matters for future productivity. In future work, we plan to compare this sample with those from other countries that have different systems for the conduct of scientific research.
32285.zh_abstract: 我们使用一个包含法国国家科学研究中心（CNRS）约1500名物理学家的庞大数据集，研究累积优势在其发表生涯中的作用。通过以每位物理学家发表论文数量和引用加权论文数量的时间序列来衡量产出，我们发现累积优势预测的简单典型事实对这些物理学家仅微弱成立。然而，包含固定效应、生命周期效应和过去生产力的回归分析提供了强有力的证据，表明累积优势对未来生产力至关重要。在未来的工作中，我们计划将此样本与其他具有不同科学研究体系国家的样本进行比较。

32284.title: Deposit Insurance, Deposit Competition, and Bank Instability
32284.zh_title: 存款保险、存款竞争与银行不稳定性
32284.authors: Matthew S. Jaremski, Steven Sprick Schuster
32284.abstract: The lack of full deposit insurance coverage might lead to additional financial instability during crises if uninsured depositors move funds to more secure institutions. Because the broad coverage of modern systems makes this dynamic hard to test, we study the role that the U.S. Postal Savings System, which provided insured accounts at some post offices, played in the Great Depression. Postal savings was associated with increased depositor withdrawals at banks in the same town. Using an IV that identifies exogenous variation in postal saving, we find that banks were more likely to close when a nearby post office accepted deposits.
32284.zh_abstract: 在危机期间，如果未投保的储户将资金转移到更安全的机构，缺乏完全的存款保险覆盖可能导致额外的金融不稳定。由于现代系统的广泛覆盖使得这种动态难以检验，我们研究了美国邮政储蓄系统（该系统在某些邮局提供保险账户）在大萧条时期所扮演的角色。邮政储蓄与同一城镇银行储户提款的增加有关。使用识别邮政储蓄外生变化的工具变量，我们发现当附近邮局接受存款时，银行更有可能倒闭。

32283.title: Project Development with Delegated Bargaining: The Role of Elevated Hurdle Rates
32283.zh_title: 委托谈判下的项目开发：高门槛利率的作用
32283.authors: John W. Barry, Bruce I. Carlin, Alan D. Crane, John Graham
32283.abstract: During project development, costs are endogenously determined through delegated bargaining with counterparties. In surveys, nearly 80% of CFOs report using an elevated hurdle rate, the implications of which we explore in a delegated bargaining model. We show that elevated hurdle rates can convey a bargaining advantage that exceeds the opportunity cost of forgone projects, whether hurdle rate buffers arise for strategic or non-strategic reasons. Using CFO survey data, we find buffer use is negatively related to the cost of capital and ex ante bargaining power, consistent with the model, and that realized returns exhibit “beat the hurdle rate benchmark” behavior.
32283.zh_abstract: 在项目开发过程中，成本是通过与交易对手的委托谈判内生决定的。在调查中，近80%的首席财务官报告使用高门槛利率，我们在一个委托谈判模型中探讨了其含义。我们表明，无论门槛利率缓冲是出于战略原因还是非战略原因，高门槛利率都可以传递一种谈判优势，这种优势超过了放弃项目的机会成本。使用首席财务官调查数据，我们发现缓冲的使用与资本成本和事前谈判能力负相关，这与模型一致，并且实现的回报表现出“超越门槛利率基准”的行为。

32282.title: “Something Works” in U.S. Jails: Misconduct and Recidivism Effects of the IGNITE Program
32282.zh_title: 美国监狱中“有些方法有效”：IGNITE项目对不当行为和累犯的影响
32282.authors: Marcella Alsan, Arkey M. Barnett, Peter Hull, Crystal Yang
32282.abstract: A longstanding and influential view in U.S. correctional policy is that “nothing works” when it comes to rehabilitating incarcerated individuals. We revisit this hypothesis by studying an innovative law-enforcement-led program launched in the county jail of Flint, Michigan: Inmate Growth Naturally and Intentionally Through Education (IGNITE). We develop an instrumental variable approach to estimate the effects of IGNITE exposure, which leverages quasi-random court delays that cause individuals to spend more time in jail both before and after the program’s launch. Holding time in jail fixed, we find that one additional month of IGNITE exposure reduces weekly misconduct within jail and three-month recidivism by 25% and 24%, respectively, with the recidivism effects growing over time. Surveys of staff and community members, along with administrative test score records and within-jail text messages, suggest that cultural change and improved literacy and numeracy scores as contributing mechanisms.
32282.zh_abstract: 美国矫正政策中一个长期且具有影响力的观点是，在改造被监禁者方面“没有方法有效”。我们通过研究密歇根州弗林特县监狱启动的一项创新的执法主导项目——通过教育自然且有意识地促进囚犯成长（IGNITE）——来重新审视这一假设。我们开发了一种工具变量方法来估计IGNITE暴露的影响，该方法利用了准随机的法庭延迟，导致个人在项目启动前后在监狱中度过更长时间。在控制监狱时间不变的情况下，我们发现额外一个月的IGNITE暴露分别将监狱内的每周不当行为和三个月累犯率降低了25%和24%，并且累犯效应随时间增长。对工作人员和社区成员的调查，以及行政考试成绩记录和监狱内短信，表明文化变革以及读写和计算能力的提高是促成机制。

32281.title: Anatomy of Technology and Tasks in the Establishment
32281.zh_title: 企业内部技术与任务的剖析
32281.authors: Xavier Cirera, Diego A. Comin, Marcio Cruz
32281.abstract: We construct a grid that covers the key business functions of an establishment and the main technologies used in each of them. We populate this grid with data from over 20,000 establishments in 15 countries. We use this dataset to document novel “facts” about how establishments use technology, the sourcing of business functions, the specialization of establishments from a task perspective, the measurement of technology, and the relationship between technology sophistication and productivity across establishments. We find that differences in technology sophistication account for 31% of cross-establishment dispersion in productivity and for more than half of the agricultural productivity gap.
32281.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个网格，覆盖了企业的主要业务功能以及每个功能中使用的主要技术。我们用来自15个国家超过20,000家企业的数据填充了这个网格。我们利用这个数据集记录了关于企业如何使用技术、业务功能的来源、从任务角度看的专业化、技术衡量以及跨企业技术复杂性与生产力之间关系的新“事实”。我们发现，技术复杂性的差异解释了跨企业生产力差异的31%，以及农业生产力差距的一半以上。
32281.meta: Programs：DAE, DEV, EFG, ITI, LS, PR；JEL：O33

32280.title: When to Appease and When to Punish: Hitler, Putin, and Hamas
32280.zh_title: 何时安抚，何时惩罚：希特勒、普京与哈马斯
32280.authors: Lee E. Ohanian, David K. Levine
32280.abstract: Much has been written about deterrence, the process of committing to punish an adversary to prevent an attack. But in sufficiently rich environments where attacks evolve over time, formulating a strategy involves not only deterrence but also appeasement, the less costly process of not responding to an attack. This paper develops a model that integrates these two processes to analyze the equilibrium time paths of attacks, punishment, and appeasement. We study an environment in which a small attack is launched and can be followed by a larger attack. There are pooling and separating equilibria. The pooling equilibrium turns the common intuition that appeasement is a sign of weakness, inviting subsequent attacks, on its head, because appeasement is a sign of strength in the pooling case. In contrast, the separating equilibrium captures the common intuition that appeasement is a sign of weakness, but only because deterrence in this equilibrium fails. We interpret several episodes of aggression, appeasement, and deterrence: Neville Chamberlain's responses to Hitler, Putin's invasion of Ukraine, Israel's response to Hamas, Turkey's invasion of Cyprus, and Serbia's attacks in Kosovo.
32280.zh_abstract: 关于威慑——即承诺惩罚对手以防止攻击的过程——已有大量论述。但在攻击随时间演变的足够丰富的环境中，制定策略不仅涉及威慑，还涉及安抚——即不对攻击做出反应的代价较低的过程。本文开发了一个整合这两个过程的模型，以分析攻击、惩罚和安抚的均衡时间路径。我们研究了一个环境，其中小规模攻击发起后可能随之发生更大规模的攻击。存在混同均衡和分离均衡。混同均衡颠覆了安抚是软弱表现、会招致后续攻击的常见直觉，因为在混同情况下，安抚是力量的象征。相反，分离均衡捕捉了安抚是软弱表现的常见直觉，但这仅仅是因为该均衡中的威慑失效了。我们解读了几个涉及侵略、安抚和威慑的事件：内维尔·张伯伦对希特勒的反应、普京入侵乌克兰、以色列对哈马斯的反应、土耳其入侵塞浦路斯以及塞尔维亚在科索沃的攻击。

32279.title: 'Morality and Political Economy' from the Vantage Point of Economics
32279.zh_title: 从经济学视角看“道德与政治经济学”
32279.abstract: This article calls for a greater integration of moral psychology and political economy. While these disciplines were initially deeply intertwined, cross-disciplinary exchange became rare throughout the 20th century. More recently, the tide has shifted again – social scientists of different backgrounds recognized that morality and politico-economic outcomes influence each other in rich bi-directional ways. Because psychologists and economists possess distinct and complementary skill sets, part of this movement consists of productive ‘economic imperialism’ – economists leveraging their empirical toolkit to test and substantiate theories from moral psychology at scale or in the wild. To illustrate this, I present two case studies of recent economics research on prominent ideas in moral psychology. First, the theory that morality is ultimately economically functional – that it evolved as a form of ‘psychological and biological police’ to enforce cooperation in economic production and exchange. Second, that the structure of morality shapes political views and polarization, including on economic issues such as taxation and redistribution. I conclude from these case studies that economists have much to gain from integrating more ideas from moral psychology, and that moral psychologists will be able to make an even more compelling case that morality and politico-economic outcomes influence each other if they engage with research in economics.
32279.zh_abstract: 本文呼吁加强道德心理学与政治经济学的整合。尽管这些学科最初紧密交织，但跨学科交流在整个20世纪变得罕见。最近，潮流再次转变——不同背景的社会科学家认识到道德与政治经济结果以丰富的双向方式相互影响。由于心理学家和经济学家拥有独特且互补的技能，这一运动的一部分包括富有成效的“经济帝国主义”——经济学家利用其实证工具包大规模或在现实环境中检验和证实道德心理学的理论。为了说明这一点，我展示了两个关于道德心理学中著名思想的近期经济学研究案例。首先，道德最终具有经济功能的理论——即道德演变为一种“心理和生物警察”，以强制执行经济生产和交换中的合作。其次，道德结构塑造政治观点和两极分化，包括在税收和再分配等经济问题上。我从这些案例研究中得出结论，经济学家可以从整合更多道德心理学思想中获益良多，而道德心理学家如果与经济学研究互动，将能够更有力地论证道德与政治经济结果相互影响。

32278.title: Risk-Adjusting the Returns to Private Debt Funds
32278.zh_title: 私人债务基金回报的风险调整
32278.authors: Isil Erel, Thomas Flanagan, Michael S. Weisbach
32278.abstract: Private debt funds are the fastest growing segment of the private capital market. We evaluate their risk-adjusted returns, applying a cash-flow based method to form a replicating portfolio that mimics their risk profiles. Using both equity and debt benchmarks to measure risk, a typical private debt fund produces an insignificant abnormal return to its investors. However, gross-of-fee abnormal returns are positive, and using only debt benchmarks also leads to positive abnormal returns as funds contain equity risks. The rates at which private debt funds lend appear to be high enough to offset the funds’ fees and risks, but not high enough to exceed both their fees and investors' risk-adjusted rates of return.
32278.zh_abstract: 私人债务基金是私人资本市场中增长最快的部分。我们评估其风险调整后的回报，采用基于现金流的方法构建一个复制其风险特征的复制组合。通过同时使用股权和债务基准来衡量风险，一个典型的私人债务基金为其投资者产生的异常回报并不显著。然而，扣除费用前的异常回报为正，且仅使用债务基准也会得出正的异常回报，因为基金包含股权风险。私人债务基金的贷款利率似乎足以抵消基金的费用和风险，但不足以同时超过其费用和投资者的风险调整后回报率。

32277.title: The Impact of Unions on Wages in the Public Sector: Evidence from Higher Education
32277.zh_title: 工会对公共部门工资的影响：来自高等教育的证据
32277.authors: Michael Baker, Yosh Halberstam, Kory Kroft, Alexandre Mas, Derek Messacar
32277.abstract: This paper studies the effects of unionization on the salaries of Canadian university faculty between 1970-2022. The evidence indicates that unionization increases salaries on average by 2 percent in the first year post-unionization and by 6 percent after 6 years. These gains are driven largely by wage increases in the bottom half of the salary distribution, and stem from the introduction of salary floors. The results further reveal that these effects are primarily concentrated between 1970 and 1995 and they are financed by an increase in student enrollment. We do not find any impacts on employment, tuition or government transfers.
32277.zh_abstract: 本文研究了1970年至2022年间工会化对加拿大大学教师工资的影响。证据表明，工会化在工会化后第一年平均使工资增加2%，六年后增加6%。这些收益主要由工资分布下半部分的工资增长驱动，并源于引入工资下限。结果进一步揭示，这些影响主要集中在1970年至1995年间，并且通过增加学生入学率来融资。我们没有发现对就业、学费或政府转移支付有任何影响。

32276.title: Invoicing Currency Choice: Strategic Complementarities and Currency Matching
32276.zh_title: 发票货币选择：战略互补性与货币匹配
32276.authors: Yushi Yoshida, Junko Shimizu, Takatoshi Ito, Kiyotaka Sato, Taiyo Yoshimi, Uraku Yoshimoto
32276.abstract: Japanese exporters’ choice of invoice currencies is investigated using newly available official Customs declaration data, which records detailed information, including the trading partners’ names, invoicing currency, and product descriptions. The strategic complementarity mechanism, that is, choosing the same invoice currency as others in the same industry or the same destination market, is found among Japanese exporters. We propose the “broad two-way exporters” whose export destinations and import origins do not necessarily match and the “narrow two-way exporters” whose export destination and import origins match in the same year. It is found that currency matching for exports and imports is as essential as strategic complementarity for two-way exporters, regardless of dominant currency, producer currency, or local currency invoicing. However, as one of this paper’s novelty, we found evidence that newly entering two-way exporters are less concerned about currency matching. Therefore, the currency matching mechanism for two-way exporters is gradually formed as they continue to survive in international markets.
32276.zh_abstract: 利用新获得的官方海关申报数据（该数据记录了包括贸易伙伴名称、发票货币和产品描述在内的详细信息），研究了日本出口商的发票货币选择。在日本出口商中发现了战略互补性机制，即选择与同行业或同一目的地市场其他出口商相同的发票货币。我们提出了“广义双向出口商”（其出口目的地和进口来源不一定匹配）和“狭义双向出口商”（其出口目的地和进口来源在同一年匹配）。研究发现，对于双向出口商而言，无论采用主导货币、生产者货币还是当地货币计价，进出口的货币匹配与战略互补性同样重要。然而，作为本文的新颖之处之一，我们发现新进入的双向出口商对货币匹配的关切较少。因此，双向出口商的货币匹配机制是在它们持续在国际市场中生存的过程中逐渐形成的。

32275.title: The Geography of Capital Allocation in the Euro Area
32275.zh_title: 欧元区资本配置的地理分布
32275.authors: Roland Beck, Antonio Coppola, Angus J. Lewis, Matteo Maggiori, Martin Schmitz, Jesse Schreger
32275.abstract: We assess Euro Area financial integration correcting for the role of “onshore offshore financial centers” (OOFCs) within the Euro Area. The OOFCs of Luxembourg, Ireland, and the Netherlands serve dual roles as both hubs of investment fund intermediation and centers of securities issuance by foreign firms. We provide new estimates of Euro Area countries’ bilateral portfolio investments which look through both roles, attributing the wealth held via investment funds to the underlying holders and linking securities issuance to the ultimate parent firms. Our new estimates show that the Euro Area is less financially integrated than it appears, both within the currency union and vis-à-vis the rest of the world. While official data suggests a sharp decline in portfolio home bias for Euro Area countries relative to other developed economies following the introduction of the euro, we demonstrate that this pattern only remains true for bond portfolios, while it is artificially generated by OOFC activities for equity portfolios. Further, using new administrative evidence on the identity of non-Euro Area investors in OOFC funds, we document that the bulk of the positions constituting missing wealth in international financial accounts are now accounted for by United Kingdom counterparts.
32275.zh_abstract: 我们评估了欧元区的金融一体化，并修正了欧元区内“在岸离岸金融中心”（OOFCs）的作用。卢森堡、爱尔兰和荷兰的OOFCs既充当投资基金中介的枢纽，又充当外国公司证券发行的中心。我们提供了欧元区国家双边组合投资的新估计，这些估计透视了这两种角色，将通过投资基金持有的财富归因于最终持有人，并将证券发行与最终母公司联系起来。我们的新估计表明，无论是在货币联盟内部还是与世界其他地区相比，欧元区的金融一体化程度都比表面上看起来要低。虽然官方数据显示，在引入欧元后，欧元区国家的投资组合本土偏好相对于其他发达经济体急剧下降，但我们证明，这种模式仅对债券组合成立，而对于股票组合，它是由OOFC活动人为产生的。此外，利用关于OOFC基金中非欧元区投资者身份的新行政证据，我们记录了国际金融账户中构成缺失财富的头寸大部分现在由英国交易对手方解释。
32275.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, IFM, ME, PE；JEL：E0, F0, G0

32274.title: Not in My Backyard? The Local Impact of Wind and Solar Parks in Brazil
32274.zh_title: 不要在我家后院？巴西风能和太阳能园区的地方影响
32274.abstract: Support from local citizens is important for the scale-up of renewable energy. We investigate the impact of utility-scale wind and solar parks on employment, GDP and public finances in Brazilian municipalities using a difference-in-differences design with matching. We find a positive employment impact of 1-1.5 jobs/MW in the 15 months preceding the commissioning of a solar park, when the park is under construction, but no impacts thereafter. For wind, we find no employment impacts during the construction phase and potentially a small impact of 0.2-0.25 jobs/MW in the 12 months following commissioning. In the year after commissioning, GDP increases 23% for an average sized solar park and 12% for an average sized wind project. The impacts only decrease slightly in the following years. We also find significant persistent fiscal revenue impacts in wind compared to only a one-time tax revenue increase in solar at the time of construction. Our results provide different implications for policymakers that want to advocate for renewable energy in their towns. While for solar, the main benefit constitutes a short-term increase in low-skilled employment and public revenues, wind energy provides more long-term financial benefits but less local employment opportunities.
32274.zh_abstract: 当地居民的支持对于可再生能源的推广至关重要。我们采用匹配的双重差分设计，研究了公用事业规模的风能和太阳能园区对巴西市政当局就业、GDP和公共财政的影响。我们发现，在太阳能园区投产前的15个月（即建设期间），就业产生1-1.5个工作岗位/兆瓦的正面影响，但此后没有影响。对于风能，我们在建设阶段没有发现就业影响，在投产后的12个月内可能产生0.2-0.25个工作岗位/兆瓦的小幅影响。在投产后的第一年，对于平均规模的太阳能园区，GDP增长23%；对于平均规模的风能项目，GDP增长12%。这些影响在随后几年仅略有下降。我们还发现，与太阳能仅在建设期间一次性税收收入增加相比，风能产生了显著且持续的财政收入影响。我们的结果为希望在其城镇倡导可再生能源的政策制定者提供了不同的启示。对于太阳能而言，主要好处是低技能就业和公共收入的短期增加，而风能则提供更长期的财政收益，但当地就业机会较少。
32274.meta: Programs：EEE；JEL：E24, H71, J21, O13, O14, Q52

32299.title: Amazon Self-preferencing in the Shadow of the Digital Markets Act
32299.zh_title: 《数字市场法案》阴影下的亚马逊自我优待
32299.abstract: Regulators around the world are discussing, or taking action to limit, self-preferencing by large platforms. This paper explores Amazon's search rankings of its own products as the European Union's Digital Markets Act (DMA) was coming into effect. Using data on over 8 million Amazon search results at 22 Amazon domains in the US, Europe, and elsewhere, I document three things. First, conditional on rudimentary product characteristics, Amazon's own products receive search ranks that are 24 positions better on average throughout the sample period. Second, the Amazon rank differential is large in comparison with the differential for 142 other popular brands. Third, shortly after the EU designated Amazon a “gatekeeper” platform in September 2023, the Amazon rank differential fell from a 30 position advantage to a 20 position advantage, while other major brands' rank positions were unaffected. The changed Amazon search rankings appear in both Europe and other jurisdictions.
32299.zh_abstract: 全球监管机构正在讨论或采取行动限制大型平台的自我优待行为。本文探讨了在欧盟《数字市场法案》即将生效之际，亚马逊对其自有产品的搜索排名情况。利用来自美国、欧洲及其他地区22个亚马逊域名的超过800万条亚马逊搜索结果数据，我记录了三点发现。首先，在控制基本产品特征后，在整个样本期内，亚马逊自有产品的搜索排名平均高出24个位次。其次，与其他142个流行品牌相比，亚马逊的排名差异较大。第三，在2023年9月欧盟将亚马逊指定为“守门人”平台后不久，亚马逊的排名优势从30个位次降至20个位次，而其他主要品牌的排名位置未受影响。亚马逊搜索排名的变化在欧洲和其他司法管辖区均有出现。

32298.title: Consumption Dynamics and Welfare Under Non-Gaussian Earnings Risk
32298.zh_title: 非高斯收入风险下的消费动态与福利
32298.authors: Fatih Guvenen, Serdar Ozkan, Rocio Madera
32298.abstract: Recent empirical studies document that the distribution of earnings changes displays substantial deviations from lognormality: in particular, earnings changes are negatively skewed with extremely high kurtosis (long and thick tails), and these non-Gaussian features vary substantially both over the life cycle and with the earnings level of individuals. Furthermore, earnings changes display nonlinear (asymmetric) mean reversion. In this paper, we embed a very rich “benchmark earnings process” that captures these non-Gaussian and nonlinear features into a lifecycle consumption-saving model and study its implications for consumption dynamics, consumption insurance, and welfare. We show four main results. First, the benchmark process essentially matches the empirical lifetime earnings inequality—a first-order proxy for consumption inequality—whereas the canonical Gaussian (persistent-plus-transitory) process understates it by a factor of five to ten. Second, the welfare cost of idiosyncratic risk implied by the benchmark process is between two-to-four times higher than the canonical Gaussian one. Third, the standard method in the literature for measuring the pass-through of income shocks to consumption—can significantly overstate the degree of consumption smoothing possible under non-Gaussian shocks. Fourth, the marginal propensity to consume out of transitory income (e.g., from a stimulus check) is higher under non-Gaussian earnings risk.
32298.zh_abstract: 近期的实证研究记录显示，收入变化的分布显著偏离对数正态分布：具体而言，收入变化呈负偏态且具有极高的峰度（长尾和厚尾），这些非高斯特征在生命周期内以及随个人收入水平的不同而显著变化。此外，收入变化表现出非线性（非对称）均值回归。在本文中，我们将一个捕捉了这些非高斯和非线性特征的非常丰富的“基准收入过程”嵌入到生命周期消费-储蓄模型中，并研究其对消费动态、消费保险和福利的影响。我们展示了四个主要结果。首先，基准过程基本匹配了经验性的终生收入不平等——这是消费不平等的一阶代理变量——而典型的高斯（持久加暂时）过程将其低估了五到十倍。其次，基准过程隐含的异质性风险福利成本是典型高斯过程的两到四倍。第三，文献中用于衡量收入冲击向消费传导的标准方法，可能显著高估了在非高斯冲击下可能实现的消费平滑程度。第四，在非高斯收入风险下，来自暂时性收入（例如刺激支票）的边际消费倾向更高。
32298.meta: Programs：AG, EFG, LS, ME, PE；JEL：E24, E60, J31

32297.title: Does nothing stop a bullet like a job? The effects of income on crime
32297.zh_title: 工作能否阻挡子弹？收入对犯罪的影响
32297.abstract: Do jobs and income-transfer programs affect crime? The answer depends on why one is asking the question, which shapes what one means by “crime.” Many studies focus on understanding why overall crime rates vary across people, places, and time; since 80% of all crimes are property offenses, that’s what this type of research typically explains. But if the goal is to understand what to do about the crime problem, the focus will instead be on serious violent crimes, which account for the majority of the social costs of crime. The best available evidence suggests that policies that reduce economic desperation reduce property crime (and hence overall crime rates) but have little systematic relationship to violent crime. The difference in impacts surely stems in large part from the fact that most violent crimes, including murder, are not crimes of profit but rather crimes of passion – including rage. Policies to alleviate material hardship, as important and useful as those are for improving people’s lives and well-being, are not by themselves sufficient to also substantially alleviate the burden of crime on society.
32297.zh_abstract: 工作和收入转移项目会影响犯罪吗？答案取决于提问的目的，这决定了“犯罪”的含义。许多研究侧重于理解为什么总体犯罪率在不同人群、地点和时间之间存在差异；由于80%的犯罪是财产犯罪，这类研究通常解释的就是这一点。但如果目标是理解如何解决犯罪问题，那么重点将转向严重暴力犯罪，这些犯罪占犯罪社会成本的大部分。现有最佳证据表明，减少经济绝望的政策会减少财产犯罪（从而降低总体犯罪率），但与暴力犯罪几乎没有系统性关联。这种影响差异很大程度上源于大多数暴力犯罪（包括谋杀）并非牟利犯罪，而是激情犯罪——包括愤怒。缓解物质匮乏的政策，尽管对改善人们的生活和福祉重要且有用，但本身并不足以大幅减轻犯罪对社会的负担。
32297.meta: Programs：CH, ED, EH, LE, LS, PE；JEL：H0, I39, K40

32296.title: Marginal Returns to Public Universities
32296.abstract: This paper studies the returns to enrolling in American public universities by comparing the long-term outcomes of barely admitted versus barely rejected applicants. I use administrative admission records spanning all 35 public universities in Texas, which collectively enroll 10 percent of all American public university students, to systematically identify and employ decentralized cutoffs in SAT/ACT scores that generate discontinuities in admission and enrollment. The typical marginally admitted student gains an additional year of education in the four-year sector, becomes 12 percentage points more likely to ever earn a bachelor’s degree, and eventually earns 8 percent more than their marginally rejected but otherwise identical counterpart. Marginally admitted students pay no additional tuition costs thanks to offsetting grant aid; cost-benefit calculations show internal rates of return of 26 percent for the marginal students themselves, 16 percent for society (which must pay for the additional education), and 7 percent for the government budget. Earnings gains are similar across admitting institutions of varying selectivity, but smaller for students from low-income families, who spend more time enrolled but complete fewer degrees and major in less lucrative fields. Finally, I develop a method to separately identify effects for students on the extensive margin of attending any university versus those on the margin of attending a more selective one, revealing larger effects on the extensive margin.
32296.zh_abstract: 本文通过比较勉强被录取与勉强被拒绝的申请者的长期结果，研究了就读美国公立大学的回报。我使用了涵盖德克萨斯州所有35所公立大学的行政录取记录（这些大学共招收美国所有公立大学学生的10%），系统地识别并利用了SAT/ACT分数中的分散截止点，这些截止点在录取和入学中产生了不连续性。典型的边际录取学生多获得一年的四年制大学教育，获得学士学位的可能性提高12个百分点，最终收入比勉强被拒绝但其他方面相同的对应者高出8%。得益于抵消性的助学金，边际录取学生无需支付额外的学费；成本效益计算显示，边际学生自身的内部收益率为26%，社会（必须为额外教育付费）为16%，政府预算为7%。不同选择性的录取院校的收入增长相似，但来自低收入家庭的学生收入增长较小，他们入学时间更长但完成学位更少，且主修收入较低的领域。最后，我开发了一种方法，分别识别对是否上大学的广延边际学生与对选择更具选择性大学的质量边际学生的影响，揭示了广延边际上的效应更大。
32296.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS, PE；JEL：H43, H75, I2, I20, I22, I23, I24, I26, I28, J24, J31

32295.title: Beliefs that Entertain
32295.authors: Ashvin Gandhi, Paola Giuliano, Eric Guan, Quinn Keefer, Chase McDonald, Michaela Pagel, Joshua Tasoff
32295.abstract: Economic research on entertainment is scant despite its large share of time use. We apply insights from behavioral economic theory to analyze the role of beliefs on players’ engagement with video games. Using detailed minute-by-minute data on 2.8 million matches from the popular video game League of Legends, we estimate a model of player engagement as a function of the path of their beliefs during the match. Consistent with reference-dependence and loss aversion but contrary to some models of anticipatory utility, lagging behind the opponent throughout the match increases engagement. This is true whether the player wins or loses, but the effect is substantially larger for losers. Players are more engaged when held in suspense throughout the match and dislike when surprises are actually realized. Winners prefer surprises to be smoothed out throughout the match, whereas losers prefer surprises clumped. We also find evidence in favor of flow theory: players engage more when they face a challenge but not when the match is too hard or too easy. We then leverage our estimated model to inform game design. We find that optimizing the information revelation process could substantially increase player engagement: the average effect is 43% as large as the effect of making a losing player feel like a winner.
32295.zh_abstract: 尽管娱乐活动在时间使用中占据很大份额，但关于娱乐的经济学研究却很少。我们运用行为经济理论的见解，分析信念在玩家参与电子游戏中的作用。利用热门电子游戏《英雄联盟》中280万场比赛的详细逐分钟数据，我们估计了一个玩家参与度模型，该模型以玩家在比赛过程中信念路径的函数形式呈现。与参照依赖和损失厌恶一致，但与某些预期效用模型相反，在整场比赛中落后于对手会增加参与度。无论玩家是赢是输，这一结论都成立，但对输家的影响要大得多。当玩家在整场比赛中处于悬念状态时，他们参与度更高，并且不喜欢意外实际发生。赢家偏好意外在整场比赛中平滑分布，而输家则偏好意外集中出现。我们还发现了支持心流理论的证据：当玩家面临挑战时参与度更高，但比赛太难或太容易时则不然。随后，我们利用估计出的模型为游戏设计提供信息。我们发现，优化信息揭示过程可以显著提高玩家参与度：平均效果相当于让输家感觉像赢家这一效果的43%。
